subject: When the facts are on your side
body:
Six hundred and fifty-four days into the Trump Administration, Americans no longer have to wonder what President Donald J. Trump will do for our... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2f973dcad1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 5, 2018
---
| | |
# When the facts are on your side

**Six hundred and fifty-four days** into the Trump Administration, Americans no longer have to wonder what President Donald J. Trump will do for our country. The results speak louder than any words could.

**Take the economy.** In 2016, liberals such as _New York Times_ columnist Paul Krugman confidently predicted the Trump Presidency would produce a “global recession, with no end in sight.” Now? The boom for American workers is so historic that former President Obama wants credit, arguing the 2018 Trump Economy is really the Obama Economy. Talk about a turnaround.

**Friday’s jobs report marked yet [another milestone](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5726c40a49&e=3ee4985eea):**
* The economy has added 4.5 million jobs since Election Day 2016.
* America’s 3.7 percent unemployment rate is the lowest since 1969.
* Consumer confidence in October surged to an 18-year high.
* Weekly jobless claims are at their lowest in more than 45 years.

**That wasn’t even the best news.** On the heels of Friday’s report, “the bigger story may be wage growth," which had been the missing piece of the sluggish post-recession “recovery” under President Obama. Last month, American workers saw their largest year-over-year pay increase in nearly a decade.

[See how the Trump Economy defied the odds—again—and created 250,000 jobs last month alone. ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1263c45e57&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch and share** : [The U.S. economy is on fire!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5014b211cd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## The Trump Economy in your backyard

**President Trump continues****his busy travel** schedule today, visiting Ohio, Indiana, and Missouri. In the past few days, the President has also traveled to West Virginia, Florida, Montana, Georgia, and Tennessee.

**Each of these states** contributes something unique to our country, but they share one important thing in common—the Trump Economy is delivering for workers and their families in every single one. For example:
* [In Ohio,](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=708ee9f3ab&e=3ee4985eea) real median household income is the highest since 2000.
* [In Missouri](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8ccf2cd42c&e=3ee4985eea), the unemployment rate hit 3.2 percent—its lowest since 2000.
* [In Indiana](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8529e0669&e=3ee4985eea), median income leapt to its highest level since 1999.

[The Trump Economy is booming from coast to coast!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c9e8dbe84&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

name: Tim Kaine
subject: This is one of the last emails I will send you during my 2018 re-election bid for the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
This is the last email I myself will send you during my 2018 re-election bid for the Senate, before polls close tomorrow. A couple thoughts and informative links I want to leave you with: ------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Good evening, Derek.

**This is one of the last emails I will send you during my 2018 re-election bid for the Senate. A couple thoughts and informative links I want to leave you with:**

Tomorrow, we can ask Virginia for a wave of decency and compassion, and if we ask loudly -- and all together -- we could really get somewhere. Make sure you're all set here: [iwillvote.com](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1755/3e0906/7ab7f708/3e37753a/2589630515/VEsH/ "https://iwillvote.com/va?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+iwillvotecom&utm_campaign=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow&source=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow"). Brush up on your Virginia voting knowledge at [TimKaine.com/Vote](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1755/3e0906/7ab7f708/3e377539/2589630515/VEsE/ "https://timkaine.com/vote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+TimKainecomVote&utm_campaign=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow&source=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow") so you can be a resource to folks tomorrow.

**One more thing -- never underestimate the power of your support.** Your donations, your kind words to me and my team, your presence at events -- it all carries more significance than I can tell you.

If you'd like to make one more donation to the campaign in the final hours to make sure we can can keep up programs like our voter assistance hotlines and our volunteer drivers to the polls, we're currently working towards hitting one last fundraising goal by the time polls close -- and we're a little over 90% there. The link to pitch in is here: [https://secure.timkaine.com/November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1755/3e0906/7ab7f708/3e377538/2589630515/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNovember&utm_campaign=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow&source=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow")

And Derek, thank you.

_Tim_ | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1755/3e0906/7ab7f708/3e37753f/2589630515/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow&source=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow")
---

* * *
|
---
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1755/3e0906/7ab7f708/3e37753e/2589630515/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow&source=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1755/3e0906/7ab7f708/3e37753d/2589630515/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow&source=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1755/3e0906/7ab7f708/3e37753c/2589630515/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/timkaine/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow&source=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow")

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1755/3e0906/7ab7f708/3e377533/2589630515/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow&source=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1755/3e0906/7ab7f708/3e377532/2589630515/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow&source=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1755/3e0906/7ab7f708/3e377531/2589630515/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow&source=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow") Thanks for having Tim's back!

2001 Jefferson Davis Highway, Suite 909
Arlington, VA 22202

[Unsubscribe](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1755/3e0906/7ab7f708/3e377530/2589630515/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11+-+Unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow&source=20181105_3_FR_TK_tomorrow")

Friend, in just THREE days, Wisconsin has the chance to change the fate of our entire country.

You might think that sounds like an exaggeration, but friend, it's not.

If we succeed in defeating Tammy Baldwin, we will be one step closer to maintaining a Republican majority in the Senate this cycle.

That’s a HUGE deal, friend. We need every Republican we can get in Washington to support President Trump's America First Agenda.

We need the help to fix health care. We need the help to build the wall. And we need the help to let you keep more of your hard-earned money.

And let's just be honest: we NEED to win. Wisconsin deserves better than swamp-dwelling elitists like Tammy Baldwin who put their own interests above OURS.

That’s why I'm reaching out to each and every supporter to make sure we're all doing our part to win this election on November 6th.

If you can chip in today to help us raise $100,000, we'll be one step closer to victory. This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b316f37574484e01ae709a287fce07db&_e=HehB5dMGnKpqj1e97gBCx0s65VnDXSPhp2J_NFBDEoaSqMS2_PFYwC9lcKEHrNOXKdXXtL8yFHExD_80QLd7dSys4e8GIQAAG4TSBOvxt4PyWWqhVt00RdRge1410pMJ7xsMOmPmKB9zba6IQMAi2a5AFzuezX21rG7ymuu8Xxh2Ul4dxED2zM6kAq1xfCB1IjnQ0MpSSZhmuBgGz5301HYKhywbeiVHWwFc3Fta5IttimLezdbMN5K6UYbeLv4P). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b316f37574484e01ae709a287fce07db&_e=zALOPEpWqY_e4iZAL9IGOuy6XH4hick-daQmrjfUg22_-5Q5EOgX4m-NadWqqwUEk-M9oN_9k9HHIrAjl76Bl3NP3Y01nlmcI0j_upMsoVJ5fI9ggITHA1-lf97UKfuMVqdy8FQgkJmMp3A6GU-qzpVIj5UJa49dza_TXaDYOJt6y5FpKQmuD_cWwDHw37hGJe3auqa3KGEKJ2tKaaDVBuYs2LPwMqQVykBFHbRDPK9ISD_jBzKuhRRhhdRc6pIXkTfIV2gWOJJIllSEP1fBAC7HCM4JbS3_3tNV3Otm-i5WofMTwyOh1t01o0Y755rAr1QXwNhlbTp0qBu_V_lLXzn8EN1pMTVrvhxxQIl0Ha2qGFgH2UFkq9BzDUKx3CPh) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b316f37574484e01ae709a287fce07db&_e=zALOPEpWqY_e4iZAL9IGOuy6XH4hick-daQmrjfUg20BpzSDoM133cXcDmJTd8WaQB94YCLCMmkrb0BPHaDL1xkbPe18X9rBg5ftJrVUT9VVqkJpglQq6y7AVgYCh23uzsMPeGYND5KHe_Tk47zhlFWXmW5eR7Z4vW-jjtbC4IMhxaYNrYWUWsKK9GIgDIoFDY8kOT6LIyPo1ykvm0ik2GJmNdBx-y2Ao9nf0EnoLTmWSekfJGbgWePjuYCL4lC9aLfNf_gHS48qbaelSthQ0uKyGjie_Q9bP_ag2xFAIEKCArVlYCecu1iEX0iIO3ef0fyYPZ1Zx_6_eI46l-hOoLc4JK9W_xqrLrWUT6f7flyGtt3l6CkgZpTmMfopmiTD) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b316f37574484e01ae709a287fce07db&_e=zALOPEpWqY_e4iZAL9IGOvyfXq76QC1gkhxREq_pFaa7KejCbgpzMuujlKIoWB_lWIsIfunbFxC6X_2elk8N5DRvD4TsUHyZCCY5AwcNcq_z9a1Xm05f0IURYZ-k2Q7kyU1-COqHytq9PIXm9X3BKqZ_Vp1k4NTkgsUcSrMmXuq4MWrN5PKrlqTviooaqAByOgzOtMTPMnTm5h4dv0kFINxcgZ2Rl5rJmUFW7vY-w459_xyrjq_aPfBVMRRFqxXVwu6wswXdlnnJoqJYo82jvQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b316f37574484e01ae709a287fce07db&_e=zALOPEpWqY_e4iZAL9IGOt4QQW47XJtxxyZHX8yrEobBWAWygA_OkPTO1-vfDW9pre2vJL1Jk1bKPu3ZZ9T38Wuwf_2CVdaUZAaRvDNtDj9vt3H-o0wMH9TRtMb5MpulKAXUXOY4BUir7N23IK1N56ym1SVwDcWL8G5VEP7M2AcXgu0J7VqZKVMN6Za4-nSA_HA1N7DhO4pBpjwpEYiRDARePRMFpSC9UJ3lx7NHI1Pdqnx-KentzGFQur_18lG2Lo7cHjPrbszVw6P6E-ywPA%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b316f37574484e01ae709a287fce07db&_e=zALOPEpWqY_e4iZAL9IGOmjRkVa51-21g1POcbG3PCop2Ua0qrNs-p8MQkbRb0f9vOEi1UUXpdoOZMCzEymzCdBoJK2E17dXFOSAr6HzAdpQHRuGYgmdee-lLmd53-SV1Rl3FbRVI4aXqMCCAVCoORqDARJVmm6B_fZUzc1sQ7bA3hyTMVHiSal2Uf9hfHzqUqiWZrrRZvDhRYv_AGe0vuDM7NE5UW1ApjKBe6b3R2HUPm1EXgB2eofMf7mV5WmNKVSAjhstRphTNiaV4dj9Fw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b316f37574484e01ae709a287fce07db&_e=zALOPEpWqY_e4iZAL9IGOuy6XH4hick-daQmrjfUg21eImjh30H1mq6L-0Z2HN7BVLnvlW85UJQBx4DldOrHCS3S5hL888eWgdN2lk32eEjkc1TpcN3UnwoibgGKE_2jg8fxY5y7IoNlMy2N2X74yGQYbFSpjR0gdrPAHfBu8VxLgne38DjAl4-NZmzS7NT35xt6mn4-KPE0KzezZDcdwlLYPIBf-Jb-vBtuBlS-VzSBQc2fqWOT9KVSV-CSiDOMaUCjfUZ0L92XxQJ44yR6a2qrWKnS5OehQTjBzuT4ggarm-Zq4l6XhQHiJiWV4FxqOBJgiE1otOIH8AiCKsMPsWBMlAV_Zv0Le95Y3ivoJMoZSMOfc7g9GHLbq8zkKDLHYTVIQe9tCqKvLHRkD_t-Nw%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b316f37574484e01ae709a287fce07db&_e=HehB5dMGnKpqj1e97gBCx0s65VnDXSPhp2J_NFBDEoaSqMS2_PFYwC9lcKEHrNOXKdXXtL8yFHExD_80QLd7dSys4e8GIQAAG4TSBOvxt4PyWWqhVt00RdRge1410pMJ7xsMOmPmKB9zba6IQMAi2a5AFzuezX21rG7ymuu8Xxh2Ul4dxED2zM6kAq1xfCB1IjnQ0MpSSZhmuBgGz5301HYKhywbeiVHWwFc3Fta5IttimLezdbMN5K6UYbeLv4P) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b316f37574484e01ae709a287fce07db&_e=HehB5dMGnKpqj1e97gBCx0s65VnDXSPhp2J_NFBDEoaSqMS2_PFYwC9lcKEHrNOXKdXXtL8yFHExD_80QLd7dSys4e8GIQAAG4TSBOvxt4PyWWqhVt00RdRge1410pMJ7xsMOmPmKB9zba6IQMAi2a5AFzuezX21rG7ymuu8Xxh2Ul4dxED2zM6kAq1xfCB1IjnQ0MpSSZhmuBgGz5301HYKhywbeiVHWwFc3Fta5IttimLezdbMN5K6UYbeLv4P) to unsubscribe. That means one thing: today is our last huge chance to reach our $100,000 goal before Election Day. And friend, it's VITAL that we keep up our momentum in the field and on TV, radio and digital to WIN tomorrow. I know so many of you have already stepped up, but we still need all hands on deck to make this work. DON’T FORGET: one of our amazing donors agreed to TRIPLE MATCH every donation that comes in between now and election day. As you know, we’re really down to the wire on this race... we cannot afford to come up short. We can't afford to let Tammy Baldwin win. Please, friend. Chip in now before it’s too late. Thanks, Leah P.S. Make your plan tonight to vote. To find your polling place, please click . \----------- forwarded message below ----------- ELECTION COUNTDOWN Goal: $100,000 DEADLINE: 3 Days | Friend, in just THREE days, Wisconsin has the chance to change the fate of our entire country. You might think that sounds like an exaggeration, but friend, it's not. If we succeed in defeating Tammy Baldwin, we will be one step closer to maintaining a Republican majority in the Senate this cycle. That’s a HUGE deal, friend. We need every Republican we can get in Washington to support President Trump's America First Agenda. We need the help to fix health care. We need the help to build the wall. And we need the help to let you keep more of your hard-earned money. And let's just be honest: we NEED to win. Wisconsin deserves better than swamp-dwelling elitists like Tammy Baldwin who put their own interests above OURS. That’s why I'm reaching out to each and every supporter to make sure we're all doing our part to win this election on November 6th. We're coming down to the wire now, friend. Just THREE days left. Please, stand up with me today and help keep us going full speed ahead until next Tuesday. I am counting on you. Thanks, Leah ** Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Sarah Neibart, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: save this phone number
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
This is it. Tomorrow is Election Day! Because this will be a historic election, it’s important to remember your rights as a voter and be cautious... | |
---
|
---
|
---
Peter,
_This is it._

**Tomorrow is Election Day!**

Because this will be a historic election, it’s important to remember your rights as a voter and be cautious of any activity happening at the polls.

The polls are open from **6:00am to 8:00pm.** State law requires that if you are in line by 8:00pm, that you be allowed to vote.

If you hear or see activity that is out of the ordinary, if you run into any problems at your polling place or if you need a ride to the polls, **please call****Te am Hugin’s Election Day Hotline at 908-664-0601 or e-mail [ElectionDay@bobhugin.com](mailto:ElectionDay@bobhugin.com?subject=Team Hugin Election Day Hotline Request "ElectionDay@bobhugin.com").**
_**Please make sure to save this number before you head to the polls tomorrow.**_

Thank you,
Sarah Neibart
Deputy Campaign Manager

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Friends, do you know where to vote tomorrow?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Find your polling location by texting ORVOTES to 83224
#
Friends,
We are so close to Election Day and while most people are talking about what we all stand to lose if we don't show up and vote, I'm focused on what we have to gain. **Tomorrow, our incredible movement will bring the political revolution to the ballot box.**
I am feeling more motivated than ever. I want you to feel this too - and I hope you will give me a second to tell you why.
Our political revolution is on the verge of making history across the country tomorrow night: Stacey Abrams is set to make history in Georgia against all the odds. Young people in Texas are showing up to vote in record numbers. Ballot initiatives around the country are seeking to expand Medicaid and ballot access, protect our right to choose, and protect our homes, land, and water from the oil and gas industry. Andrew Gillum has transformed politics in Florida forever, and tomorrow could be voted in as its first black governor.
**There's so much to gain tomorrow, and Our Revolution has mobilized like never before to make sure our endorsed candidates - and the issues they are running on - have a shot at winning.**
**[Tomorrow is the day we've been waiting for. Find your polling location by texting ORVOTES to 83224, or click here.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a76c/bed43eb/8c5ba319/75fc4999/2963161788/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/our-rev-polling-locator?source=em181105-full")**
You have shown - with your voices in the streets and at town halls across the country, with your calls to Congress - that the many voices of this movement are more powerful than the 1 percent who flood money into our elections. As I've traveled the country with Senator Bernie Sanders I have been awed by the strength of our grassroots organizing. Since 2016, our movement has changed what is possible in politics.
We will win because people across this nation want a government that makes sure every American can thrive, no matter how much money they make, their race, their religion, who they love, or where they're from. Now is the time to vote for candidates on the local, state, and federal level to make this vision into reality.
**[To maximize turnout, we need to make sure we get everyone we can to the polls tomorrow. Text ORVOTES to 83224, tell your friends to text ORVOTES to 83224, and share this form to confirm your polling place on Election Day.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a76c/bed43eb/8c5ba319/75fc4999/2963161788/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/our-rev-polling-locator?source=em181105-full")**
Thank you for joining us in this fight.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a76c/bed43eb/8c5ba319/75fc4999/2963161788/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/our-rev-polling-locator?source=em181105-full")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a76c/bed43eb/8c5ba319/75fc4998/2963161788/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a76c/bed43eb/8c5ba319/75fc499b/2963161788/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a76c/bed43eb/8c5ba319/75fc499a/2963161788/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a76c/bed43eb/8c5ba319/75fc4985/2963161788/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Tina Smith
subject: My last ask of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
A personal request before the polls open.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-november?refcode=rtw_20181105-3_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friends, our volunteers and organizers are ready to talk to every voter possible. Our ads are up. There's only one thing left -- we have to make our goal and fulfill our budget before polls open tomorrow morning. Everything we've worked for comes down to this. We have a chance to send a message across the country about what we're fighting for here by defeating Trump's endorsed candidate, showing we will stand up to corporate special interests, and that grassroots campaigns can defeat anything right-wing super PACs throw at us. But to do that, we have to hit this final goal and ensure we fund every piece of this campaign. So I'm asking you for the final time and making one more personal request of you, team. Can you pitch in before midnight? We still need to raise $11,490 to hit our budget. Here's the secure link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-november](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-november?refcode=rtw_20181105-3_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** Thank you, and let's go win this tomorrow! Tina

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: It's time to open those gates wide.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
I graduated as the valedictorian of Avondale High School in 1991. Like most Georgia valedictorians, I was invited to meet the Governor of Georgia at the Governor's Mansion. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f9/34a064cc/3852e56/70cdf07/1580135309/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend, I graduated as the valedictorian of Avondale High School in 1991. Like most Georgia valedictorians, I was invited to meet the Governor of Georgia at the Governor's Mansion. It was a big deal for my family. That morning, I got up and put on my Sunday best. My parents and I boarded the MARTA bus with the domestic workers and mechanics who, like us, could not afford a car. We took MARTA all the way from DeKalb to Buckhead, got off at West Paces Ferry Road, and walked up the long driveway to the big black gates around the property. When we got to the guard station, the guard looked at my parents, then he looked at me, and he said, "This is a private event, you don't belong here." He looked over our shoulder at the MARTA bus driving away and he told himself a story about who would be on that bus - and in his story, they did not belong in the Governor's Mansion. My parents pushed back, and we were eventually let in. But looking back on that day, I don't remember meeting the Governor of Georgia. I don't even remember celebrating my accomplishments with valedictorians from 159 counties and 180 school districts. The only thing I remember is a man blocking the gates of the most powerful place in Georgia, telling me that I did not belong. **With your help, tomorrow, we will open those gates wide. We will change the face of leadership in the South.** **[MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f9/34a064cc/3852e56/70cdf04/1580135309/VEsE/ "https://staceyabrams.com/vote/")** Our journey to the Governor's Mansion has not been easy, because the work of democracy is tough. Over the past year and a half, we have visited and revisited places where past gubernatorial candidates have never set foot. We have knocked on doors and built relationships in small towns no campaign bus has ever slowed down for. And by reaching out to the Georgians who have felt unseen and unheard for years, we have built a movement that the entire nation is watching with bated breath. It is time to finish what we started. It is time to vote. It is time to claim our victory. Because while some may cast aspersions, WE will cast our ballots. While others attempt to cloud our vision, to distract us with political games, and to steer us off course in the last 24 hours of this race, WE will remain focused. We will march forward. Because when we all stand united, the architects of voter suppression don't stand a chance. We are Georgia, and we are ready for so much more. I am ready for the road ahead, and I need you by my side - because the next step is one we take together. For Georgia, Stacey Abrams
---
**[MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f9/34a064cc/3852e56/70cdf04/1580135309/VEsF/ "https://staceyabrams.com/vote/")**

|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f9/34a064cc/3852e56/70cdf05/1580135309/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f9/34a064cc/3852e56/70cdf02/1580135309/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f9/34a064cc/3852e56/70cdf03/1580135309/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/staceyabrams/")

name: Team Inslee
subject: Jay needs to know: Are you voting this year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Jay has a very important question for you.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b616/2f5ea88d/7bfbf385/2cbd845e/2971960649/VEsH/ "https://inslee.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/i-will-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-11-05_gotv-survey&source=ema_2018-11-05_gotv-survey&utm_campaign=gotv-survey&utm_medium=ema") Friend, With just one day left until Election Day, Jay has a very important question for you: **Have you made a plan to vote this year?** | [YES »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b616/2f5ea88d/7bfbf385/2cbd845e/2971960649/VEsE/ "https://inslee.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/i-will-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-11-05_gotv-survey&source=ema_2018-11-05_gotv-survey&utm_campaign=gotv-survey&utm_medium=ema") | | [NO »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b616/2f5ea88d/7bfbf385/2cbd845e/2971960649/VEsF/ "https://inslee.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/i-will-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-11-05_gotv-survey&source=ema_2018-11-05_gotv-survey&utm_campaign=gotv-survey&utm_medium=ema")
---|---|---
Research tells us that voters who make a plan -- and share their plan with their family and friends -- are more likely to actually vote on Election Day and encourage others to vote as well.
As a loyal member of Team Inslee, we're counting on your vote for progressives to win tomorrow!
This election is incredibly important. We can take back the House and send a clear message to the Trump administration that we won't stand for their policies of hatred and division. We can win governors races across the nation and stop the Republicans from unfair gerrymandering in our districts. And we can make a bold statement about the need to act on climate change.
But we can only accomplish all this**if we all turn out to vote.**
[**So let us know: Have you already voted? And if not, can we count on your vote?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b616/2f5ea88d/7bfbf385/2cbd845e/2971960649/VEsC/ "https://inslee.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/i-will-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-11-05_gotv-survey&source=ema_2018-11-05_gotv-survey&utm_campaign=gotv-survey&utm_medium=ema")
[YES »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b616/2f5ea88d/7bfbf385/2cbd845e/2971960649/VEsD/ "https://inslee.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/i-will-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-11-05_gotv-survey&source=ema_2018-11-05_gotv-survey&utm_campaign=gotv-survey&utm_medium=ema") | | [NO »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b616/2f5ea88d/7bfbf385/2cbd845e/2971960649/VEsA/ "https://inslee.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/i-will-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-11-05_gotv-survey&source=ema_2018-11-05_gotv-survey&utm_campaign=gotv-survey&utm_medium=ema")
---|---|---
Tell us if you're planning to vote, and if you'd like, share your voting plan with us too! Just remember, if you live in Washington state, you can mail in your ballot for free -- no postage required! If you live anywhere else in the United States, you can [look up your polling information here.](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b616/2f5ea88d/7bfbf385/2cbd845d/2971960649/VEsB/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/")
Thanks for all that you do!
Team Inslee

_Jay Inslee is leading a movement to create long-lasting progressive change in America. Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

| [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b616/2f5ea88d/7bfbf385/2cbd845c/2971960649/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-contribute-button?utm_source=ema_2018-11-05_gotv-survey&refcode=ema_2018-11-05_gotv-survey&utm_campaign=gotv-survey&utm_medium=ema")

clean_body: Jay has a very important question for you. | "" Friend, With just one day left until Election Day, Jay has a very important question for you: Have you made a plan to vote this year? | "" | | "" ---|---|--- Research tells us that voters who make a plan -- and share their plan with their family and friends -- are more likely to actually vote on Election Day and encourage others to vote as well. As a loyal member of Team Inslee, we're counting on your vote for progressives to win tomorrow! This election is incredibly important. We can take back the House and send a clear message to the Trump administration that we won't stand for their policies of hatred and division. We can win governors races across the nation and stop the Republicans from unfair gerrymandering in our districts. And we can make a bold statement about the need to act on climate change. But we can only accomplish all thisif we all turn out to vote. "" "" | | "" ---|---|--- Tell us if you're planning to vote, and if you'd like, share your voting plan with us too! Just remember, if you live in Washington state, you can mail in your ballot for free -- no postage required! If you live anywhere else in the United States, you can "" Thanks for all that you do! Team Inslee Jay Inslee is leading a movement to create long-lasting progressive change in America. Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country. | ""

subject: Can we count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Democrats need to win seats like this in order to take back the House. Peter, we're down to the final hours before the polls open. One of the districts I've had my eye on for the last year is CA-48, where Hillary Clinton won.

If Harley Rouda can unseat Republican Congressman Dana Rohrabacher tomorrow, we'll be on our way to taking back the House!

If you care about electing a Congress that will fight for fair wages, protect coverage for pre-existing conditions, and tackle our infrastructure, then I need to join me in helping Democrats like Harley Rouda.

[**Can I count on you, Peter? A new poll has Rouda and Rohrabacher with one percent of each other, and if we raise another $1,763 for Rouda by midnight, he 'll be able to reach more undecided voters in the final stretch.**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?refcode=RTW_181105_Rouda-2_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

After a long campaign, it all comes down to tomorrow. I know that we can do this.

**Please make a donation now:[http://ca.voteforlinda.com/rouda](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?refcode=RTW_181105_Rouda-2_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Thank you!

Linda

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: Last-minute ads push
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Here we are, on the eve of the election of our lifetimes: We have under 24
hours left to elect Beto and unseat Ted Cruz. Every minute of every hour
will count. There’s still time for you to make an impact.

This is a full-on sprint until the polls close tomorrow at 7:00 PM CT and
7:00 MT. Beto is tied with Ted Cruz, from what the most recent reports can
tell us. But whether we win or lose depends on the numbers of voters who
turn out tomorrow, and there’s still time to reach them and make sure they
do.

So we’re pulling out all the stops. We’re making some last-minute
adjustments to our digital and TV ads to make sure Beto’s message spreads
to millions of Texas voters using only the most powerful, strategic
tactics.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1019&akid=24594%2E444211%2Ebp50Kd ]We need more resources to pull off this last-minute ads push. Can Beto
count on you one more time to pitch in? The success of this final push could
spell the difference between winning and losing.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1020&akid=24594%2E444211%2Ebp50Kd ]Contribute
$3
»

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1021&akid=24594%2E444211%2Ebp50Kd ]Beto for Texas

We have come so far together. We’ve reached millions of voters because of
your contributions already. And not with a dime of special-interest or PAC
money. No matter what happens tomorrow, I will never forget what we’ve
done -- in the biggest effort of our lives.

Now, it all comes down to the last hours of this race. Everything is on
the line. Everything that we’ve built: our historic field program, massive
grassroots campaign, all the records we’ve broken...I want to see it all pay
off tomorrow, probably more than anything that I’ve wanted in my life. I
bet you want to see it, too.

What I’m asking now is that you build upon everything we’ve accomplished
so far, and see this through to the end: [ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1022&akid=24594%2E444211%2Ebp50Kd ]Every contribution now will
be funneled directly into the last ads pushes of the campaign. Please
pitch in whatever you can. Beto needs you. Texas, the country, and the
people of tomorrow need you.

These are the hours that count the most. Let’s give them everything we
have -- and win.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

Jody Casey
Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181105&t=1024&akid=24594%2E444211%2Ebp50Kd ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181106footer&t=1025&akid=24594%2E444211%2Ebp50Kd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=24594%2E444211%2Ebp50Kd

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Brandon Davis, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: This is it
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35c9/9e00690/56d9ce3b/2400a457/1251168913/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/")
Friends,

In just a few hours, WE will choose Florida's next Governor.

WE will vote for a better public education system.
WE will vote for affordable and accessible healthcare.
WE will vote for environmental protections, clean air and clean water.
WE will vote for true criminal justice reform.

**This can be Florida's reality, but tomorrow, WE have to vote before the polls close at 7:00 p.m.**

Listen, we have never been as close as we are right now. Thanks to your hard work, heart, and commitment, we're just a day away from bringing it home and electing the most unapologetically progressive Governor in Florida's history -- but this is how we win:
1. **[Find your voting location now, and make a plan to vote before 7:00 p.m. tomorrow.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35c9/9e00690/56d9ce3b/2400a456/1251168913/VEsE/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=FL")**
2. [**Walk into your nearest office and find out how you can help get out the vote.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35c9/9e00690/56d9ce3b/2400a469/1251168913/VEsF/ "https://andrewgillum.com/offices/")
3. **[Join our texting crew and help get out the vote.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35c9/9e00690/56d9ce3b/2400a468/1251168913/VEsC/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/gillumforgovernor/event/83873/")**
4. **[Remind your friends to vote for Mayor Gillum on Facebook.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35c9/9e00690/56d9ce3b/2400a46b/1251168913/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//www.facebook.com/andrewgillumfl/videos/2022414701140124/")**
5. **[Remind your friends to vote for Mayor Gillum on Twitter.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35c9/9e00690/56d9ce3b/2400a46a/1251168913/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/home?status=Make%20sure%20you%20vote%20for%20%40AndrewGillum%20tomorrow!%20Polls%20are%20open%20until%207pm%20%23BringItHome%20%0A%0Ahttps%3A//twitter.com/AndrewGillum/status/1059446692980891648")**

This is it. The stakes have never been higher, so let's get to work and win this thing.

Bring it home,

Brandon Davis
Campaign Manager
Andrew Gillum for Governor

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35c9/9e00690/56d9ce3b/2400a46d/1251168913/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35c9/9e00690/56d9ce3b/2400a46c/1251168913/VEsO/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/").

subject: Get out and VOTE today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Friend,
It's 6:30AM and the polls across West Virginia are open. Make your voice heard and be counted in this election. The polls are open today from 6:30AM to 7:30PM. You can find your polling place here: https://www.iwillvotewv.com/

Bring five friends with you to vote. After that, text or call five more friends and push them to get out and vote because there is too much at stake for anyone to stay home.
Thanks,
Joe

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: Today's the Day - Let's "Ring" It Home! ☑️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/VF4MvQmvo8UGaon5SOSe8mRSm2iyVdIJfi-I6-4FIV0=/ZuGKF8oip0N6_MzRuLTQ27zRTBkLBYEFTEVOiiEYI3s=) Friends and Neighbors -- We are approaching the end of a long and incredibly inspiring journey. Over the past year, from the Panhandle to the Everglades, I have traveled across our great state, meeting so many of you, hearing your stories, thoughts and ideas for our communities and our future. There has been a pretty clear consensus - **you want to see our state move** **f****orward with a fresh vision, not with the same tired - and failed - status quo that our current CFO and state leadership represent.** I have shared [**my vision for Florida, which is focused on an innovation driven economy ready made for the 21st century and vital checks and balances to our state and federal government. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/VF4MvQmvo8UGaon5SOSe8mRSm2iyVdIJfi-I6-4FIV0=/PsyzI1p4-Az5aFOKeJxPj0x6AKYTc8TXT3W4JdNDa7k=)

This is the vision I am ready to lead in our State Cabinet with as your next Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Now, after all the ads, debates and campaign pitches, it all comes down to **this moment - Election Day.** Today is most important part of all - casting your **_VOTE!_** [Let's send JR to the Cabinet. Vote Today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/VF4MvQmvo8UGaon5SOSe8mRSm2iyVdIJfi-I6-4FIV0=/68aTkwn3hTa_QJq8mcKSH2_Fro7EM2AzyQ3VWY-NGk4=?midqs=gQTWcDawFVI3IARaMw0Vpw==) As your next CFO, I will be an essential check and balance in the Cabinet, making sure you and your interests are the priority - and that _YOUR _hard earned money is being spent in the way you were promised it would be. I will take my experience from the tech world and the Legislature with me to the Cabinet, to help build and foster an innovation driven economy, ready made for the 21st Century. But I have an election to win first, _**today.**_ **And I can 't do it without your help.** If you haven't already, _**please be sure to vote today!**_ **Polls are open from now through 7 PM.** **[Please click here to confirm your polling place. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/VF4MvQmvo8UGaon5SOSe8mRSm2iyVdIJfi-I6-4FIV0=/q-J5bSm46AniHwfjR7hbq7mcz49wUlVWHImuWfNqvXQ=)** **Please share this e-mail with your family, friends, colleagues and neighbors.** Thank you so much for all of your support - **now, let 's "Ring" it home!** **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

name: Scholten Election Team
subject: What we can do today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
**The polls are officially open! **
Today, we can elect J.D. Scholten and retire Steve King.
Today, we can choose decency over division.
Today, we can choose the future over the past.
Today, we can choose someone to be proud of, instead of a national embarrassment.
Today, we can stand tall and say, “Enough is enough!”
Today, we can choose to fight for a healthcare system, an economy, and a government that work for all of us.
Today, we can elect J.D. Scholten and retire Steve King.
**Today, we can make history, but only if we vote before the polls close at 9:00PM. **
Peter, we have never been as close as we are right now to defeating Steve King. Thanks to the hard work, the support, and the heart of everyone who has been a part of this movement, today is the day we can accomplish what most considered impossible when this journey started 15 months ago!
And this is how we win:
1. **[Find your voting location now, and make a plan to vote before 9:00PM.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3044628/20120400/-171009025?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGJjNmRlNS1jM2UxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o_F-dzVkwvbTMC2O7jfnzF0XiFPrlm5sqs5MHzXRqAU=)**

3. **[Share this Facebook post to remind your friends to vote for J.D. Scholten.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3044630/20120408/47351758?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGJjNmRlNS1jM2UxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o_F-dzVkwvbTMC2O7jfnzF0XiFPrlm5sqs5MHzXRqAU=)**
4. **[Retweet this tweet to remind your friends to vote for J.D. Scholten.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3044632/20120409/-1393338177?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGJjNmRlNS1jM2UxLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o_F-dzVkwvbTMC2O7jfnzF0XiFPrlm5sqs5MHzXRqAU=)**
5. **Talk to your friends, your co-workers, and your neighbors; let everyone know just how important this election is, and how vital it is that they vote.**

This is it. The stakes have never been higher, so let's stand up, get to work, and win this thing.
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten

subject: Remember this? I sent you this 2 years ago.

body:
What if they chose to ignore it... |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d7c4dfe3c068e740dea67d029dc258e6385a660bf9e9a4ff1b12e362d2522c7d318e6a68e54d5d12981bf26428516c264e1dd9350da665f8)
---
|

Friend,

I am forwarding you an email I sent on November 8, 2016...

I asked all of our supporters across America to make ONE FINAL CONTRIBUTION to help in the most important races that would decide the election, and ultimately, the fate of our nation.

Over 500,000 supporters stepped up. And if they never did, I would not be writing to you today as your President. _I will never forget these patriots._

So today I ask you to make one more EMERGENCY contribution and again be remembered as someone who believed in us _despite_ the media's predictions.

**[Please step up as an Election Day Donor and make your FINAL contribution of $5 this election. Your contribution will be TRIPLE MATCHED.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d91ca5454adb9861a5649b7a2bb6d32a5a254acaeb17aaefe37b06791693c498f2d36aaf22cf464b49320a55baaf90c231)**
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d99604850998befef4a70ef9eef400c26cc73698c66810c25c1771bcd87f542b13307be189455130cdfb51d95ff373ec50) [CONTRIBUTE $20 = $80](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d99629786b0777ce55bbf6fa46718713e9594357e17dff3f2e999bccd87f9682933bdafa4da090625ef2ae5992bd17d0cb) [CONTRIBUTE $15 = $60](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d9141518160aa195b0530836267b62f78356f0ef9c0f9783546817e91174a83f41972ab5b0ebb5d675fdc25a5f146f3741) [CONTRIBUTE $10 = $40](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d988c9cbcae6ed70845a0db6b0eb3466affc1af2e7886eba4bca7ac1fce7300e582a7007c3195fa5c48bebfcbe0e229450) [CONTRIBUTE $5 = $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d9520370b35d63aa6797be1441326714ec5d090e341926aafbb12d1c235258566f3c319c1a95702a4982a88dc7fac34e1c) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d914f52e1564fb03bd553ff6a17a7caab90e82b3f1f7ed6ce7675a75eb283346d6fb895394ae3911fcbd2e0ec7468f50c4)
**Your contribution will help as we work hard all day to turn out every last voter.

Remember: the elections aren't over until polls close on the West Coast.**

**[Please make a final contribution of $5 IMMEDIATELY to help us turn out every last voter.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d928c51ca6003f118e8007871fe536dbe6be44832dab9e733f1d37fe8d19a214c22449fe3679170f1809ab4e4b3c52e8e4)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d9ceb3f1807ee32141043ad2225c861a5d17ef25cd0d0c6e9bfd4911742463b05271e8185327aec1969296dba9aafc54bb)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States
[CONTRIBUTE $5 = $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d9e3c24a36e9b87f15bcf0898f3fc7084872c5243c8616bf30cacedf0327575bac6504480ccbf3382b9502a4a7b7193370)

**\--------- Forwarded Message ---------**
**From:** Donald J. Trump
**Date:** Tue, Nov 8, 2016 at 8:13
**Subject:** I am proud
**To:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d91ee7546ab61a4987c8a11a1b361ebdf6a2dd3195e94905133c7ddce57539d378f62638d9d71f3d69c3dd59382395aa3c)**

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d91a38d69288defab5de42bf2d366ff3075652e2ad118601d838784fe0583edecc7bc16be7b277d8298d2c04eb9fda488a)

Friend,

Your support has meant the world to me and my family.

Remember when we were at 1% in the polls, and the media said we could never win the primary? You are the reason we stand here today.

And tonight we have the opportunity to prove them wrong once again. _Tonight is our chance to write the greatest American comeback story in the history of politics._

My team is going to be giving me a list of Election Day Donors who stepped up to help fund an emergency pool of resources as game-day decisions are made in critical states between now and the close of polls.

I'll be on calls with our political director all day, determining which states need last-minute resources.

**[Please step up as an Election Day Donor and make your FINAL contribution of the entire election.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d928c51ca6003f118e8007871fe536dbe6be44832dab9e733f1d37fe8d19a214c22449fe3679170f1809ab4e4b3c52e8e4)**
[CONTRIBUTE $20 NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d99629786b0777ce55bbf6fa46718713e9594357e17dff3f2e999bccd87f9682933bdafa4da090625ef2ae5992bd17d0cb) [CONTRIBUTE $15 NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d9141518160aa195b0530836267b62f78356f0ef9c0f9783546817e91174a83f41972ab5b0ebb5d675fdc25a5f146f3741) [CONTRIBUTE $10 NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d988c9cbcae6ed70845a0db6b0eb3466affc1af2e7886eba4bca7ac1fce7300e582a7007c3195fa5c48bebfcbe0e229450) [CONTRIBUTE $5 NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d9520370b35d63aa6797be1441326714ec5d090e341926aafbb12d1c235258566f3c319c1a95702a4982a88dc7fac34e1c) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d914f52e1564fb03bd553ff6a17a7caab90e82b3f1f7ed6ce7675a75eb283346d6fb895394ae3911fcbd2e0ec7468f50c4)

You have the chance to join your fellow Americans in writing the story -- that November 8, 2016 became the day _We The People_ took back our country and delivered justice to the forgotten men and women of America.

WHEN WE WIN, the fight will just be getting started. We'll have our work cut out for us over the next four years to fix our broken political system, reverse the damage of the last eight years, and drain the swamp of corruption in Washington.

Your contribution today will be a sign of unwavering support at the final hour, and will help fund an emergency pool of resources used for last-minute decisions based on our internal polls.

**[Please make your last contribution of the entire campaign and get on my list of Election Day Donors.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d928c51ca6003f118e8007871fe536dbe6be44832dab9e733f1d37fe8d19a214c22449fe3679170f1809ab4e4b3c52e8e4)**

Thank you, Friend. I am proud of everything you've done.

-Donald J. Trump

[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=46245e396e88f6d9e3c24a36e9b87f15bcf0898f3fc7084872c5243c8616bf30cacedf0327575bac6504480ccbf3382b9502a4a7b7193370)

It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

subject: POLLS ARE OPEN >> JOIN US FOR AN ELECTION CELEBRATION TONIGHT!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
Have you found your polling place yet? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/anderson-rally-with-mike-braun-congresswoman-brooks-467749?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=818ddfb621&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Polls are open, and every minute you wait is a minute wasted.

Have you voted yet? I'm sure you've made your voting plan already, so we're asking you to do us a favor. [**Will you share this link on your Facebook page?**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0507127d8c&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Polls across the state will be open until 6 PM local time, so time is short**.

Help us tell Democrat Joe Donnelly that it's time for him to leave Washington by voting for a conservative leader who will fight alongside President Trump to put America First. The race is a _dead heat_ , and **we need everyone's votes to succeed**.

[**Please help others find their polling places by sharing this link**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2171cd7a26&e=1acd9bb3d6).

This is it. It's the end of the road, and we need to do everything we can to keep Indiana DARK RED.

We know you agree - that's why we need to do everything we can to GET OUT THE VOTE.

And then after you vote, come down to the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis at 6 p.m. for our **Election Night Victory Party, and hear from Mike Braun and our entire Republican statewide team!** [RSVP here!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bbbe802f87&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Thanks so much for your support during this race - now ON TO VICTORY!

\- Kyle Hupfer, Chairman

It's Election Day and we need to make our voices heard. This year's midterms are incredibly important, both for Minnesota _and_ the nation, so it's time to head to the polls.
**Polls are open in Minnesota today from 7 a.m. to 8 p.m., and as long as you 're in line by 8 p.m., you can still vote.**
Remember: President Trump lost Minnesota by less than two points in 2016, and he made it clear he's targeting our state this year. We need to make sure all of Amy's supporters cast their ballots by the time the polls close.

Team Klobuchar

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: It's Election Day.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
If you didn't cast your ballot early, I need you to get to the polls now. And not just you - bring your friends, your family, your neighbors, every eligible Georgia voter you know. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7fb/34a064cc/3924860/70cde35/3439801067/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend, Today's the day. The day we make our voices heard. The day we lead Georgia forward for years to come. _Today is Election Day._ If you didn't cast your ballot early, I need you to get to the polls now. And not just you - bring your friends, your family, your neighbors, every eligible Georgia voter you know. In Georgia, the polls are open from 7am to 7pm, and if you're in line at 7pm you must be allowed to cast your ballot. That means you only have until 7pm tonight to either cast your ballot or be in line at your assigned polling location. But before you go, follow these three steps to make sure your vote is counted:
1. **Check your assigned polling location** \- It might have changed since the last time you voted, and it is likely different from the early voting location you saw advertised. Find your designated polling place for Election Day by logging in to **[My Voter Page](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7fb/34a064cc/3924860/70cde32/3439801067/VEsE/ "https://www.mvp.sos.ga.gov/MVP/mvp.do")**. If you experience any difficulties logging in, call the Voter Protection Hotline for assistance at 1-888-730-5816.
2. **Bring a photo ID** \- You need to show some sort of photo identification in order to vote. This is to verify your name. **[Click here for a full list of accepted forms of identification.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7fb/34a064cc/3924860/70cde33/3439801067/VEsF/ "http://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2")**
3. **Know your rights** \- Your right to vote is sacred. _Period_. Know your rights before you enter your polling location so if something is wrong, you can flag it right away. And if you have any trouble voting you have the right to cast a provisional ballot! **[Click here for more information about your right to vote.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7fb/34a064cc/3924860/70cde30/3439801067/VEsC/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/vote/")**

And if you run into ANY problems at the polls, call our **Voter Protection Hotline at 1-888-730-5816.**

The only way we lose this election is if we stay home. So please, go vote. Make sure your friends do the same. And forward this email to anyone you know who might need the extra push to get to the polls. Thank you for seeing our campaign through to the end. I appreciate you, Stacey Abrams
---

|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7fb/34a064cc/3924860/70cde31/3439801067/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7fb/34a064cc/3924860/70cde3e/3439801067/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7fb/34a064cc/3924860/70cde3f/3439801067/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/staceyabrams/")

1270 Caroline Street
Suite D120-447
Atlanta, GA 30307

name: Denise Pence
subject: [Election Day 2018] It’s here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence Victory |
body:
It’s the day we’ve all been waiting for... It’s Election Day, and the polls are officially OPEN. Today, Hoosiers across the state will make our voices.. [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5b96c18e5bf9449ea3e0d31aca47ad52&_e=oL_tXZxJPWUPUNWKeG0S9Ln8KLGy8cnchU1VcZQOrF4A0YlTEKKtoPQIwvUR4Xdq-N40_YFT2k0XfOC5ZU6IRKqRRfFkvpZvlp9eu8Dney0wcQF4oY5BAYc8YIcm0FZoamv5pHuSwIeQ9vXrain1IjDIzOcootWekU-2LEH0m42OmnWG41QcSz9hw5EAMUwBvH16DXeYUyqpwWCICk1ek_FtNtQV_oDO1WTKiruMmMEoxhK4sGeOTkm1o2CLoG_uOXlB1L23tB969xHoAOJTJ8Icj4bqMwkPqoXmiaEVPJdME2GHrnLZTBWM70YsuqMKFljkbaaXuyWR_rnXHUVI0JtBDMshZjusA_6RkdmIWdo%3D) | |
---
_It’s the day we’ve all been waiting for..._

**It’s Election Day, and the polls are officially OPEN.**

**Today, Hoosiers across the state will make our voices heard, and I wanted to reach out to you personally and make sure you’re planning on voting for Greg today.**

I am so proud of Greg and the campaign our entire team has run. It’s been grassroots focused and all about YOU. We’ve traveled to all 19 counties, attended nearly 300 community events and talked directly to Sixth District voters. And we are so honored and humbled by the outpouring of support we’ve received.

Greg will fight for YOU every day in Washington, just like he fought for our country in the U.S. Marine Corps and like he’s always fought for our family.

_**The polls are OPEN and we need your vote!**_

**[Get all of your voter information you need right here >>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5b96c18e5bf9449ea3e0d31aca47ad52&_e=oL_tXZxJPWUPUNWKeG0S9Ln8KLGy8cnchU1VcZQOrF4A0YlTEKKtoPQIwvUR4Xdq-N40_YFT2k0XfOC5ZU6IRKqRRfFkvpZvlp9eu8Dney0wcQF4oY5BAYc8YIcm0FZoamv5pHuSwIeQ9vXrain1IqViM5jWemq6rOGfCnBzA2906iWIdHZHc17J8RD8TnqN5iFzS_CwiBpIBfbxWdyxqAqJMwKbcLV9TNQJFTbfGZDa1tZjmBLGxgZNUi5XvM2txxh-GxREWbIZ_s_qka3pm97fk32BHaj-vubYuFfGpN-mVlrzePXQ0d_PIpQA9pKrHVkMZVYfzT0gJ58pWkeOxTMSRFJGHCs-I0rqhMvBE6s%3D)**

We need every member of Team Pence to mobilize and vote TODAY.

**[Find your polling location now and vote before the polls close at 6 PM>>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5b96c18e5bf9449ea3e0d31aca47ad52&_e=oL_tXZxJPWUPUNWKeG0S9Ln8KLGy8cnchU1VcZQOrF4A0YlTEKKtoPQIwvUR4Xdq-N40_YFT2k0XfOC5ZU6IRKqRRfFkvpZvlp9eu8Dney0wcQF4oY5BAYc8YIcm0FZoamv5pHuSwIeQ9vXrain1ImeWPsNpUAVLY0yx-Bp5w5PkQo2AnqsR0MjNdwncf3HkI0G62l36LAtxWyqht2g5uLgdoLMAJTmvaWZFl3kRtMAjQRd2777kfLJRi5qJeCMiQtXO7EzoPnsiXsq7V6EFWSx0Fit2poDS9v7ErgDvTPFWgGBYx8EnsxQG4S29yuhTNdVAIFrsrDIzEzsPoKO6goeyXPy0S9xsxRkiLCuEr3E%3D)**

**I know you can lead us to victory!**

Greg and I thank you again for all of your support.

Greg is Ready to Serve, Again!
Denise Pence

** _P.S._ Don’t forget your government-issued photo ID before you head to the polls. Find your polling location here:****** **[https://vote.gop/?utm_source=105996](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5b96c18e5bf9449ea3e0d31aca47ad52&_e=oL_tXZxJPWUPUNWKeG0S9Ln8KLGy8cnchU1VcZQOrF4A0YlTEKKtoPQIwvUR4Xdq-N40_YFT2k0XfOC5ZU6IRKqRRfFkvpZvlp9eu8Dney0wcQF4oY5BAYc8YIcm0FZoamv5pHuSwIeQ9vXrain1IjLvXX1a9_ZgwAo48x2DeK8vba4QP3mU0rZHZgnOzeM0v5vD7UrthvDgqeIdbQkugk3Z87dNwK1zLBYsFkZT3F1Y_saJEWSNUHO8Ed3LrGRL_h1W0pv9dDJ4NX9VKWqTkc3a-tR3d67CeC0jDvkND8VcL0wYPiOeUchzeR_9lxU6dz1m0hyV8Ctd6UADOoCIc9utb_SQo6lPjmk1c0pkW4M%3D)**

name: David Ortiz, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: Remember to vote today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
|
---
[ ](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a02b/5e076a9e/54a7bcb5/14425527/2470254044/VEsH/ "http://ginaraimondo.com")

| | Hi friend, **Today is election day.** Have you made a plan to vote? Over the last few years, things have gotten better. We're fixing our roads and bridges. We're getting Rhode Islanders back to work, and we're creating good jobs. We're making sure that Rhode Islanders have access to the training and education they need to get ahead, from Pre-K all the way through job training for adults. **All that progress is at stake. There 's only one choice for Governor who will protect our progress and continue bringing change to Rhode Island: Gina Raimondo.** Joe Trillo and Allan Fung want to undo all the progress we've made, threatening to take us backwards. **The stakes are high. Have you made your plan to vote?** First, you need to find out your polling location. **[Look it up here.](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a02b/5e076a9e/54a7bcb5/14425526/2470254044/VEsE/ "https://ginaraimondo.com/vote")** Next, make sure that you have a valid photo ID. **[Here's a list of what will work.](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a02b/5e076a9e/54a7bcb5/144255d9/2470254044/VEsF/ "https://vote.sos.ri.gov/assets/pdfs/voter_id_information.pdf")** Then, figure out how you're going to get to the polling place, and find a friend you can take with you. Polls are open from 7am - 8pm. You will determine whether we keep moving forward or whether we go backwards. **Vote Gina Raimondo for Governor.** David Ortiz
Deputy Campaign Manager
---
|
---

Friends of Gina Raimondo

Providence, RI 02940

name: Kyrsten Sinema
subject: Today's the day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
Go vote! |
---
| | It's Election Day!
**Polls are open from 6:00 AM-7:00 PM
Vote in person or drop off your mail-in ballot at a polling location TODAY.
[Click here to find your polling location.](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0406/45aebd3c/564f5a8f/2ca5b3d8/889624375/VEsH/ "https://vote.kyrstensinema.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+find+your+polling+location&utm_campaign=KS_EM_EN_BAZ_181106_1_1&source=KS_EM_EN_BAZ_181106_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_EN_BAZ_181106_1_1#vote3") **
---

Team,, it all comes down to this. I am so grateful for all you've done so far to get us to today -- from knocking on doors to chipping in a contribution to talking to your friends and neighbors about our campaign.

**We are so close to the finish line, but we need Arizonans to vote in record numbers today to win this thing. I 'm counting on you to do your part.**

**[Find your polling place->](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0406/45aebd3c/564f5a8f/2ca5b3d9/889624375/VEsE/ "https://vote.kyrstensinema.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+Find+your+polling+place+rarr&utm_campaign=KS_EM_EN_BAZ_181106_1_1&source=KS_EM_EN_BAZ_181106_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_EN_BAZ_181106_1_1#vote3")**
We need all hands on deck for these final hours to turn out every voter we need to win. Sign up here for one last volunteer shift before polls close -- you can even call voters from your house!

**[Sign up to volunteer->](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0406/45aebd3c/564f5a8f/2ca5b3da/889624375/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/sinemaforarizona?source=sinemaem1104?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=3+-+Sign+up+to+volunteer+rarr&utm_campaign=KS_EM_EN_BAZ_181106_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_EN_BAZ_181106_1_1")**
Thanks for your support.

See you at the finish line,
Kyrsten

"https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-oct-7?amount=3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=4+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=KS_EM_EN_BAZ_181106_1_1&source=KS_EM_EN_BAZ_181106_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_EN_BAZ_181106_1_1")**

name: Election Day Reminders (via Manchin for Senate)
subject: GO VOTE Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
If you haven't early voted already, make sure you get to the polls between 6:30 a.m. and 7:30 p.m. to cast your vote for Joe! |
---
|
---
| Friends -

Today is Election Day.

If you haven't early voted already, make sure you get to the polls between 6:30 a.m. and 7:30 p.m. to cast your vote for Joe!

[**_Unsure of your voting location? Click here._**](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/498183f5/2efbf85c/6141708d/4c90505e/1836851282/VEsH/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=WV&utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=1+-+Unsure+of+your+voting+location+Click+her&utm_campaign=JM_EM_FR_WV_181106_s1_e1&source=JM_EM_FR_WV_181106_s1_e1&refcocde=JM_EM_FR_WV_181106_s1_e1")

Need a ride to the polls? Contact us at Campaign Headquarters: 304.343.0939.

No one should stay home on Election Day. Make sure you get out to vote before 7:30 PM tonight!

**[FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/498183f5/2efbf85c/6141708d/4c90505d/1836851282/VEsE/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=WV&utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=2+-+FIND+YOUR+POLLING+PLACE&utm_campaign=JM_EM_FR_WV_181106_s1_e1&source=JM_EM_FR_WV_181106_s1_e1&refcocde=JM_EM_FR_WV_181106_s1_e1")**
Together, we can keep fighting for West Virginians first. Make your voice heard by voting - every vote counts.

**And when you go vote, be sure to text five friends to come with you!**

Thanks,

All of us on Team Manchin

[](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/498183f5/2efbf85c/6141708d/4c90505c/1836851282/VEsF/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=WV&utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=JM_EM_FR_WV_181106_s1_e1&source=JM_EM_FR_WV_181106_s1_e1&refcocde=JM_EM_FR_WV_181106_s1_e1")

_Joe Manchin getting ready to ride off for the "Take Me Home" Ride across the great state of West Virginia. This is how Joe gets out the vote!_

---
| Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
---
Joe is running for reelection to the United States Senate because West Virginia's working families are still fighting to make a decent living, despite working their hearts out everyday. Joe's not a huge fan of Washington, but the time that he's spent there has been filled with bipartisan bridge-building to try and find commonsense solutions to our shared problems.

He can't win this race without support from people like you. name: Bob Casey
subject: Polls are open, Pennsylvania!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7f8c/51dbcc2a/151434c7/3acff5a/3432910034/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
It's Election Day, team, and you know what that means: time to get out and vote!

Polls are open across the Commonwealth, and they will stay open until 8pm tonight. Please find time today to make your voice heard. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines this year.

If you need any information on your polling place or what you need to vote, here's the best link:

**_[padems.com/vote](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7f8c/51dbcc2a/151434c7/3acff5b/3432910034/VEsE/ "https://www.padems.com/vote/")_**

Let's move our nation forward -- together.

Bob

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.

name: Florida Democrats
subject: POLLS ARE OPEN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| Friend,

**Polls are officially open, so if you haven 't voted already, we NEED you to go cast your ballot today!**

[**Find your polling place here and make a plan to vote today ->**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4ba1c/1a5213b3/69726b01/7195fd83/1672268513/VEsH/ "http://fl.dems.vote/guide?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Find+your+polling+place+here+and+make+a+&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_GOTV_FL_181106_1_4&source=FDP_EM_GOTV_FL_181106_1_4&refcode=FDP_EM_GOTV_FL_181106_1_4")

Whether you go before work, during lunch, or while you're running errands, it's VITAL you go vote **before 7:00 p.m.** today!

It's time to turn all that frustration and anger from the last two years into action to support the amazing slate of Democrats running in Florida!

[**GO VOTE ->**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4ba1c/1a5213b3/69726b01/7195fd82/1672268513/VEsE/ "http://fl.dems.vote/guide?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+GO+VOTE+rarr&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_GOTV_FL_181106_1_4&source=FDP_EM_GOTV_FL_181106_1_4&refcode=FDP_EM_GOTV_FL_181106_1_4")

Florida Democrats

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: thanks + personal request Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | First, I wanted to say: **Thank you, Peter.** We've been through a lot -- multiple opponents, personal attacks and smears from Congressman Jim Renacci, close polls, and numerous visits from President Trump and Vice President Pence. But thanks to you, we've built one of the strongest grassroots teams in the country. And time and time again, we've fought back. Together. Today is the day where we see the impact of our hard work. So here's what I'm asking you to do: [**can you chip in one final contribution before the polls close tonight?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd5a/4462dc26/74a280c8/201f02e7/1831165302/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA2YW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181106am?refcode=sbe181106am_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd5a/4462dc26/74a280c8/201f02e6/1831165302/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA2YW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181106am?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181106am_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd5a/4462dc26/74a280c8/201f02e6/1831165302/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA2YW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181106am?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181106am_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd5a/4462dc26/74a280c8/201f02e6/1831165302/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA2YW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181106am?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181106am_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd5a/4462dc26/74a280c8/201f02e7/1831165302/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA2YW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181106am?refcode=sbe181106am_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** This campaign isn't over until the last voter in line casts a ballot. And if the votes are close, this race may not be over even then. Luckily for us, 12 hours is plenty of time to get supporters to the polls. Kimberly, the campaign's Finance Director, tells me we need to bring in another $18,000 before the day is out. [**Consider this a last-minute personal request -- give what you can.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd5a/4462dc26/74a280c8/201f02e7/1831165302/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA2YW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181106am?refcode=sbe181106am_m_other&refcode2=3268183") I'm getting ready to go cast my ballot at our local polling place. I couldn't be prouder to vote for this strong slate of Ohio Democrats, and I hope we can turn out as many Ohioans as possible to do the same. With gratitude, Sherrod

clean_body: | | | First, I wanted to say: Thank you, Peter. We've been through a lot -- multiple opponents, personal attacks and smears from Congressman Jim Renacci, close polls, and numerous visits from President Trump and Vice President Pence. But thanks to you, we've built one of the strongest grassroots teams in the country. And time and time again, we've fought back. Together. Today is the day where we see the impact of our hard work. So here's what I'm asking you to do: "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" This campaign isn't over until the last voter in line casts a ballot. And if the votes are close, this race may not be over even then. Luckily for us, 12 hours is plenty of time to get supporters to the polls. Kimberly, the campaign's Finance Director, tells me we need to bring in another $18,000 before the day is out. "" I'm getting ready to go cast my ballot at our local polling place. I couldn't be prouder to vote for this strong slate of Ohio Democrats, and I hope we can turn out as many Ohioans as possible to do the same. With gratitude, Sherrod | "" | | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Today is the day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
If you haven’t voted yet though, time is almost up. Peter, Today is the day. After months of traveling the state and meeting thousands of Missourians, Election Day is finally here. I want to thank you for your support these past months; from donating to volunteering or even talking to a friend, you have indeed made all the difference. If you haven’t voted yet though, time is almost up. Don’t look back tomorrow and wish you had done more; grab a friend and go vote by 7pm tonight. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Our job today, if you have not already, is to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
I want to tell you something that will not come as a surprise to many of you.
#

Sisters and Brothers -
I want to tell you something that will not come as a surprise to many of you. And that is this:
If turnout across the country is large today, if young people and working people come out and vote, then I believe Democrats will elect a number of progressive governors, state legislatures, will gain control of the House and possibly the Senate, as well.
If turnout is low today, then right-wing Republicans are going to keep control of many of the levels of government they currently occupy.
So our job today, if you have not already, is to vote -- and to encourage the people you know to do the same.
Today’s election is the most important midterm election in the modern history of the United States.
Together, we can put an end to the reactionary Trump agenda and move our country forward to rebuilding the declining middle class. We can create a Congress which stands for economic, political, racial and environmental justice, not for oligarchy or authoritarianism.
Those are the stakes:
**[Use this tool to verify your registration status and find your polling place today. Then please share this email with several of your friends and ask them to do the same.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6886?t=1&akid=324%2E150750%2EpKaPlE)**
[FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6886?t=2&akid=324%2E150750%2EpKaPlE)
Now is the time for millions of working families to come together and make certain that our children and grandchildren are able to enjoy a quality of life that brings them health, prosperity, security, and joy -- and that once again makes the United States the leader in the world in the fight for democracy, human rights, environmental sanity, and for a world of peace.
Today, we have a great chance to advance our cause -- but that will only happen if you make your voice heard and vote.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6886?t=3&akid=324%2E150750%2EpKaPlE)
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=324%2E150750%2EpKaPlE). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&akid=324%2E150750%2EpKaPlE).
