name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: It’s finally here!
body:
| | Christians all across the country are voting
---
| Peter, Today is the day. The elections are finally here! Many of you have voted early, and many of you will vote today. Either way, you have not acted alone! Remember, millions of Christians are also voting. And all of our votes together in communities across the country make a big impact. Regardless of the election outcomes, we are not worried because we know God is in complete control. We have stewarded the opportunity we have been given to stand for biblical values, and we leave the rest to Him. In this last day of midterm voting, we want to encourage you to share with others that you have voted! If you are on social media consider posting a picture with the hashtag #ThisChristianVotes, and if you aren’t on social media, simply forward this email to a friend to remind them they are not voting alone - a national community of Christians voted too! We are united together in our commitment to Pray, Think, and Vote! **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181106com01&n=1) **P.S. If you haven’t made your choice yet on what candidates you are voting for[view your sample ballot and voter guide](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ibayQ8uFkD5SUWdxjC9OY7mglYsxbCkFqLgMoOCnxBaePJatGeij0gXop1_Be1f8703dhmj7iAw2igCWIrtENUk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181106com01&n=2) to learn about the candidates and their endorsements. subject: Happy voting!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Team:

**Election Day is here, and there 's one last thing you need to do: GO VOTE!**

[Find your polling information here ->](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4b0/43d8135f/65ad9c9a/510188ae/1507101300/VEsH/ "http://iwillvote.com/nm?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Find+your+polling+information+here+rarr&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_1_3&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_1_3&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_1_3")

Polls just opened, so if you didn't already cast your ballot, it's vital you go today and make your voice heard.

Every single vote will count. That's why it's critical you make a plan to vote today and cast your ballot before polls close at 7:00 p.m.!

[**Make sure you go vote today. If you already voted, forward this email to family and friends so they cast their ballot, too!**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4b0/43d8135f/65ad9c9a/510188d0/1507101300/VEsF/ "http://iwillvote.com/nm?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+Make+sure+you+go+vote+today+If+you+alrea&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_1_3&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_1_3&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_1_3")

Martin

name: John Shimkus
subject: The polls are open!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus
body:
Today is the day we’ve all been waiting for. Today is our chance to stand up for our values by electing the strong leaders our community needs. Toda
[](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=503be19cd1a0420bb860662294966f91&_e=LWI5sOBrF5lX83zFyjTt9R6VGbGQUCt-BzCkXQ_0u8VplmXgZeM44ogD5AIF3mry1hE5znEqEVeKn1weayteiQwY35I5Oy3fcpuM2UZrdc1sXGtZftf7hwRLtoGU27OwD7TY3SB05HTm6fayqi6TRjVvGRhdWT-ppa2YzUKTdgRNMcCDN5pD-hCW6EnO_p51b0-dgx5LPpuRLFmkgifbZ5_9vwK2ZssVCdTBJ1qhq8g3qZxmWrAHsaYfQ7KsSteoWNwGvYj7WqWTHAUR3mvVJiEsH09uOmIhDD7J8oWclZDH5dhAuIG9P1lX3A9uaQXaMlhX36LK5iVVqXPdHU2wZKBuO2TniiAMrDlArvghMJQ1Y3lXKcRnuzltcjovsvCyNKZdBu_PeQnCNcW6voY7Bg%3D%3D)
Friend,

Today is the day we’ve all been waiting for. Today is our chance to stand up for our values by electing the strong leaders our community needs.

Today, if you haven’t done so already, to get to the polls as soon as possible and make sure your voice is heard. **Polls are open today from 6 a.m. to 7 p.m.**

[FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=503be19cd1a0420bb860662294966f91&_e=LWI5sOBrF5lX83zFyjTt9VqfPSElkp7NYm8tDHWVnSqQR-5t2HKJ0eGAfTqEqr1l16M2Uz7i4caDMalwF4HwjvOqGWNszuB2L9zMZsHF8YYAt7X2xk6rqYqzQVLNvFvzNmmRuuGE8qbm7vwTXXYMMSWaOCIcryVGeFCaR8F311ge7b0ATT-TtseVAIblrG8tfbdd88J9pLRX2QPz_vlepVv3_Ed-kIY5P8gcYf8stGTtJKCMEuZXe7W9cyzxETIz)
---
It has been the honor of my life to serve you in Congress, and I pledge to continue my service to our community. I’ll always put Central and Southern Illinois first, protecting our families, our farms, our veterans, and our small businesses.

I’ll make sure that in the midst of all the craziness in Washington, Illinois has a voice and we get the job done.

So today, I ask for your vote. I ask that you cast a vote for me, and for the other Republicans we need to keep Southern Illinois strong.

Get out to the polls and vote for the leaders Central and Southern Illinois needs!

Sincerely,

John

Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus.
---

name: Team NHGOP
subject: NHGOP Election Day Integrity Hotline
body:
**Tuesday Morning, 11/06/2018** Derek, **Today is the day!** We need you to**Get Out AND Vote** \- and we need to make sure our elections are run with integrity. We have established an **Election Day Hotline** that will go to our team of lawyers to assist with any issues observed at the polls on Election Day. **The hotline number is 603-670-2101.**
Should you have other questions regarding party-related business on Election Day, please contact the NHGOP HQ Mainline at 603-225-9341. ****Sincerely, Team NHGOP | |
---
---

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Today, I'm asking for your vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Words cannot express my gratitude for all of those who have put up signs, stood in long lines to vote, or contributed to my campaign. | |
---
Friends: Representing this community in Congress has been the greatest honor of my life. Together, we've been able to do incredible, important work to position our region to lead in the creation of a new American economy, rooted in technology and additive manufacturing. Together, we've fought to expand access to quality, affordable healthcare that doesn't discriminate against individuals with preexisting conditions. And together, we've gone to the mat to protect the pensions of our retirees. [Watch my closing statement from last week's debate. I'd be honored to have your vote today >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9087/5486deaa/2449d0a0/dcf684b/339005924/VEsH/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CWbbY8hXEGo") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9087/5486deaa/2449d0a0/dcf684b/339005924/VEsE/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CWbbY8hXEGo") Words cannot express my gratitude for all of those who have put up signs, stood in long lines to vote, or contributed to my campaign. There's still so much more to do, and I need your support to keep fighting. This is the most important election of our lifetime. I implore each of you to vote. Make your voices heard. Voting will shape the future of our country, not just for the next two years, but for the next generation. Democracy is not a spectator sport, and we need everyone on the field right now. I am asking for your vote today because I believe our best days are ahead of us, not behind. Together, we will build a better tomorrow for our families, friends, and neighbors. Thank you for standing with me. \-- Tim [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9087/5486deaa/2449d0a0/dcf684a/339005924/VEsF/ "http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CWbbY8hXEGo")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9087/5486deaa/2449d0a0/dcf684d/339005924/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9087/5486deaa/2449d0a0/dcf684c/339005924/VEsD/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")

# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9087/5486deaa/2449d0a0/dcf684f/339005924/VEsA/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9087/5486deaa/2449d0a0/dcf684e/339005924/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9087/5486deaa/2449d0a0/dcf6871/339005924/VEsO/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2018, and big-money attacks from D.C. Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9087/5486deaa/2449d0a0/dcf684d/339005924/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9087/5486deaa/2449d0a0/dcf684c/339005924/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Lauren@TimKaine.com
subject: [ATTN: Team Kaine] 9:30 AM Report from the field!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Hi, team! Your 9:30 report below:

**[November 6th, 2018: ELECTION DAY](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1750/3e0906/7a94d5fd/3e37759f/2453604039/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181106_2_FR_LR_lauren-field&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+November+6th+2018+ELECTION+DAY&utm_campaign=20181106_2_FR_LR_lauren-field&source=20181106_2_FR_LR_lauren-field")**
\-- Polls close in roughly 9 hours
\-- Volunteers were sent out in every congressional district in Virginia at 8:00 AM
\-- Over 100 drivers are set up across the Commonwealth based out of various polling locations
\-- The voter protection team has been in place at key polling places since 5:30 AM

It's shaping up to be a historic Election Day in the Commonwealth.

I want to make sure we are getting resources to our folks out on the ground so they can focus on their important tasks and don't have to worry about anything else. We're going to be sending out shipments of snacks, water, and back-up supplies at 2 PM. **Can you push around this link? Any funds we collect here I can use to get out more supplies to the team today:** [https://secure.timkaine.com/November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1750/3e0906/7a94d5fd/3e37759e/2453604039/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181106_2_FR_LR_lauren-field&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNovember&utm_campaign=20181106_2_FR_LR_lauren-field&source=20181106_2_FR_LR_lauren-field")

Another important thing to circulate: Please make sure we're getting our Voter Assistance Hotline number out far and wide so Virginians can call in with any questions: 844-4VA-VOTE (844-482-8683).

**Again, please send all donations for the supply shipment to our volunteers here:** [https://secure.timkaine.com/November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1750/3e0906/7a94d5fd/3e37759d/2453604039/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181106_2_FR_LR_lauren-field&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNovember&utm_campaign=20181106_2_FR_LR_lauren-field&source=20181106_2_FR_LR_lauren-field")
**And send all Virginia voting questions here: 844-4VA-VOTE**

Thanks for all of your help team! The energy on the ground right now is amazing. We've truly built something special here in Virginia.

Kind Regards,

_Lauren Reyes_
Virginia Coordinated Campaign Field Director | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1750/3e0906/7a94d5fd/3e37759c/2453604039/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181106_2_FR_LR_lauren-field&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181106_2_FR_LR_lauren-field&source=20181106_2_FR_LR_lauren-field")

name: Ben Jealous
subject: Today is generations in the making
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
I won't forget how I got here.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3790e5/7ab0e2c4/7e777e35/3499aa1f/452603388/VEsH/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/") Friend -- You don't need me to remind you that today's Election Day -- you've been gearing up for this with me for months. For me and my family, this day is generations in the making. It's what my ancestors dreamed of when they walked out of slavery more than 150 years ago -- that someday, they would be part of a legacy that would lead the state that oppressed them. To lead the state that just a generation ago forced out my own parents when they fell in love, because my black mother and my white father couldn't legally marry in the state of Maryland. This day is bigger than me, and I won't forget that. But we can only make history today if you vote. [**Find your polling place and get to the polls before they close today at 8 pm.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3790e5/7ab0e2c4/7e777e35/3499aa1f/452603388/VEsE/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/") Thank you, truly, for everything. Ben | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3790e5/7ab0e2c4/7e777e35/3499aa1e/452603388/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-fight?refcode=OHQ11068Ab")

clean_body: I won't forget how I got here. | "" Friend -- You don't need me to remind you that today's Election Day -- you've been gearing up for this with me for months. For me and my family, this day is generations in the making. It's what my ancestors dreamed of when they walked out of slavery more than 150 years ago -- that someday, they would be part of a legacy that would lead the state that oppressed them. To lead the state that just a generation ago forced out my own parents when they fell in love, because my black mother and my white father couldn't legally marry in the state of Maryland. This day is bigger than me, and I won't forget that. But we can only make history today if you vote. "" Thank you, truly, for everything. Ben | "" * PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

body:

Friend,

I am forwarding you an email I sent on November 8, 2016...

I asked all of our supporters across America to make ONE FINAL CONTRIBUTION to help in the most important races that would decide the election, and ultimately, the fate of our nation.

Over 500,000 supporters stepped up. And if they never did, I would not be writing to you today as your President. _I will never forget these patriots._

So today I ask you to make one more EMERGENCY contribution and again be remembered as someone who believed in us _despite_ the media's predictions.

**[Please step up as an Election Day Donor and make your FINAL contribution of $5 this election. Your contribution will be TRIPLE MATCHED.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03ba43d4184a1f62bfafba604c120bbce6a947332f849715b56894b3c44761d5f16049029b2562fab9f7403a4365fb571a90)**
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03baf86477f5e27312d8dbbb4423a3dc0a56c1f06d7c1692d8a5e3b07b6b5131641d86b1f479dbbd1ccb99ec04c896c17d73) [CONTRIBUTE $20 = $80](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03ba0ed9404c550468ac382d13e9c76ddfe61f3c74f8744d4e0504c294babd78808f3e8bc997d41a5ced642d89206c42425b) [CONTRIBUTE $15 = $60](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03baf11089dbbab4eb49b86441ab19bdee99c5460b6f3b3a436ca1d1822da647f4f8661982d115a99b07a10b55475fd23a86) [CONTRIBUTE $10 = $40](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03ba783b3ff629482ac99968cb7a44e45148e36eefcc2476f14d007ab098e01e08ea8bb1bfff7630a7f67cde33864312dd2d) [CONTRIBUTE $5 = $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03bada6fc05178be65d2f1dd08343fbfa79a836227c13c6d68f2a9df569c388d3c61cc3affc8ae693bd0adf50ae8bfbb9cf1) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03ba9a1c17748d66419134cb93eb5a0bf9c2268243ac3c3db19d86970b2a6b2b573930d84ef1212bd565a9eab5f463f956d3)
**Your contribution will help as we work hard all day to turn out every last voter.

Remember: the elections aren't over until polls close on the West Coast.**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03ba6de1591dae9e4cc7854a664ca8629f3abfda4b2f678678071e711cde6208847c45868275a3f2f6aac7027f761665cb34)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States
[CONTRIBUTE $5 = $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03babdbfb5e5b44782bb05c57d1593ac2e3dfa444df8068281dcc518d91b8119268379c6c2124a4bbc985ec43245299c4f78)

**\--------- Forwarded Message ---------**
**From:** Donald J. Trump
**Date:** Tue, Nov 8, 2016 at 8:13
**Subject:** I am proud
**To:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03ba3002df8cf5fe60add0cb6363856da4af954f5aeef311ca596142cc24b49356f0982aa54304413f191d67807292734615)**

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03bac1da0f064b3988ad1c29e87c9d2c1cbf5e47766a6490688af71ffbee4920a88d6fc2fb2233369c0199a5d3ee0ff625d5)

Friend,

Your support has meant the world to me and my family.

Remember when we were at 1% in the polls, and the media said we could never win the primary? You are the reason we stand here today.

And tonight we have the opportunity to prove them wrong once again. _Tonight is our chance to write the greatest American comeback story in the history of politics._

My team is going to be giving me a list of Election Day Donors who stepped up to help fund an emergency pool of resources as game-day decisions are made in critical states between now and the close of polls.

I'll be on calls with our political director all day, determining which states need last-minute resources.

**[Please step up as an Election Day Donor and make your FINAL contribution of the entire election.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03bac64e669b3eb53f7d98c355595c7c6cc1af19d9e613f558408c47e8fcd2663630798e9cd2c68578db0f0b1a2c8fce798c)**
[CONTRIBUTE $20 NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03ba0ed9404c550468ac382d13e9c76ddfe61f3c74f8744d4e0504c294babd78808f3e8bc997d41a5ced642d89206c42425b) [CONTRIBUTE $15 NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03baf11089dbbab4eb49b86441ab19bdee99c5460b6f3b3a436ca1d1822da647f4f8661982d115a99b07a10b55475fd23a86) [CONTRIBUTE $10 NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03ba783b3ff629482ac99968cb7a44e45148e36eefcc2476f14d007ab098e01e08ea8bb1bfff7630a7f67cde33864312dd2d) [CONTRIBUTE $5 NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03bada6fc05178be65d2f1dd08343fbfa79a836227c13c6d68f2a9df569c388d3c61cc3affc8ae693bd0adf50ae8bfbb9cf1) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03ba9a1c17748d66419134cb93eb5a0bf9c2268243ac3c3db19d86970b2a6b2b573930d84ef1212bd565a9eab5f463f956d3)

You have the chance to join your fellow Americans in writing the story -- that November 8, 2016 became the day _We The People_ took back our country and delivered justice to the forgotten men and women of America.

WHEN WE WIN, the fight will just be getting started. We'll have our work cut out for us over the next four years to fix our broken political system, reverse the damage of the last eight years, and drain the swamp of corruption in Washington.

Your contribution today will be a sign of unwavering support at the final hour, and will help fund an emergency pool of resources used for last-minute decisions based on our internal polls.

**[Please make your last contribution of the entire campaign and get on my list of Election Day Donors.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03bac64e669b3eb53f7d98c355595c7c6cc1af19d9e613f558408c47e8fcd2663630798e9cd2c68578db0f0b1a2c8fce798c)**

Thank you, Friend. I am proud of everything you've done.

-Donald J. Trump

[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d761b78c614e03babdbfb5e5b44782bb05c57d1593ac2e3dfa444df8068281dcc518d91b8119268379c6c2124a4bbc985ec43245299c4f78)

name: Amanda Eubanks
subject: I'm not panicking...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
As the finance director, you're used to hearing me beg for money in these messages. If you want to give, we're still trying to close a few budget gaps. We do need about 100 supporters
|
---

| | As the finance director, you're used to hearing me beg for money in these messages. If you want to give, we're still trying to close a few budget gaps. We do need about 100 supporters to step up before midnight. [**You can be one of them by clicking here to give.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427ade/e3b7d3/5e19389c/25556bfa/2766973020/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181106amnc?refcode=kme181106amnc_m") But today, the panic has a different cause: **We need to get as many voters to the polls as we possibly can.** _Have you voted yet?_ If not, what are you waiting for?! **Find your polling place at **[_**www.vote-nc.com**_](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427ade/e3b7d3/5e19389c/25556bf9/2766973020/VEsE/ "https://www.vote-nc.com/")** and get there before 7:30pm EST.** If you have -- THANK YOU! Now help us get others to the polls. **Post on Twitter & Facebook. ** **Call friends and neighbors.** **Forward this email to the registered voters you know.** This time tomorrow, we'll know if we did enough to send Kathy to Congress. Today, let's make sure we do everything possible to make that happen. Thanks! Amanda
---

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). name: Breaking Election News (West Virginia)
subject: He's hiding this from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Patrick Morrisey, our state's chief legal officer is intentionally violating a court order. And now he wants to be YOUR U.S. Senator! |
---
|
---
| Patrick Morrisey, our state's chief legal officer is intentionally violating a court order. And now he wants to be YOUR U.S. Senator!

[_**Morrisey thinks that his delay tactics will dupe West Virginians. He doesn 't want us to know the truth, so he's hiding opioid documents until after we go to the polls. It's outrageous!**_](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/49818387/2efbf85c/6141e61d/4c905143/4230835481/VEsH/ "https://www.wvgazettemail.com/news/cops_and_courts/judge-sets-morrisey-misses-deadline-to-release-drug-company-communications/article_181ff1cf-f34b-5988-8f05-cf0792c92ba8.html?utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=1+-+Morrisey+thinks+that+his+delay+tactics+w&utm_campaign=JM_EM_EN_WV_181106_s3_e1&source=JM_EM_EN_WV_181106_s3_e1&refcode=JM_EM_EN_WV_181106_s3_e1")

Patrick Morrisey will do anything to keep his connections to the opioid industry a secret, even if it means ignoring a court order from a West Virginia judge. **Please make sure people know:**

[_**Spread the word on Facebook**_](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/49818387/2efbf85c/6141e61d/4c905142/4230835481/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=%20https%3A//www.wvgazettemail.com/news/cops_and_courts/judge-sets-morrisey-misses-deadline-to-release-drug-company-communications/article_181ff1cf-f34b-5988-8f05-cf0792c92ba8.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=2+-+Spread+the+word+on+Facebook&utm_campaign=JM_EM_EN_WV_181106_s3_e1&source=JM_EM_EN_WV_181106_s3_e1&refcode=JM_EM_EN_WV_181106_s3_e1")

[ _**Share this news on Twitter**_](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/49818387/2efbf85c/6141e61d/4c905141/4230835481/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wvgazettemail.com%2Fnews%2Fcops_and_courts%2Fjudge-sets-morrisey-misses-deadline-to-release-drug-company-communications%2Farticle_181ff1cf-f34b-5988-8f05-cf0792c92ba8.html%3Futm_medium%3Dsocial%26utm_source%3Dtwitter%26utm_campaign%3Duser-share&text=Judge%20sets%2C%20Morrisey%20misses%20deadline%20to%20release%20drug%20company%20communications&via=wvgazettemail&utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=3+-+Share+this+news+on+Twitter&utm_campaign=JM_EM_EN_WV_181106_s3_e1&source=JM_EM_EN_WV_181106_s3_e1&refcode=JM_EM_EN_WV_181106_s3_e1")
This is one more reason why West Virginia must reject Patrick Morrisey at the polls today.

Please make sure to cast your vote for Joe Manchin for U.S. Senate today before 7PM.

[_**You can confirm your polling place here.**_](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/49818387/2efbf85c/6141e61d/4c905140/4230835481/VEsC/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=WV&utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=4+-+You+can+confirm+your+polling+place+here&utm_campaign=JM_EM_EN_WV_181106_s3_e1&source=JM_EM_EN_WV_181106_s3_e1&refcode=JM_EM_EN_WV_181106_s3_e1")

Thanks for standing with Joe,

West Virginians for Joe Manchin

---
| Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
---
Joe is running for reelection to the United States Senate because West Virginia's working families are still fighting to make a decent living, despite working their hearts out everyday. Joe's not a huge fan of Washington, but the time that he's spent there has been filled with bipartisan bridge-building to try and find commonsense solutions to our shared problems.

He can't win this race without support from people like you. body:
Throughout this race, we’ve worked side by side to make sure we had the best chance of winning and keeping our Republican majority, and now we’re.....
Friend, your support has helped us get here today.

Throughout this race, we’ve worked side by side to make sure we had the best chance of winning and keeping our Republican majority, and now we’re down to our final test.

In less than 12 hours, the polls will close. We’ll know our fate. And it'll be over.

But we're not there just yet... we've still got to win this thing today.

Right now, we've got hundreds of volunteers in the field working to get out the vote, and they're not stopping until those polls close at 8:00 PM.

We’ve got to do it for middle-class families who want to keep more of their hard-earned money. We’ve got to do it to secure our borders. We’ve got to do it for our friends and neighbors who deserve the best health care. And we’ve got to do it for our veterans who deserve the best for all they’ve done for us.

I know today is a busy day for so many of us, but I have to ask you for a big favor, friend. This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ed3794628fb42e181bb13c071a64f62&_e=DXXimxEGOU7f-bb1G1yDUF4QIHdZOYzT-Nvt6gtG1L9qguvOAima84F6RtoAYRTlvuZF6KNDulvvch4yQbsAC15U4a1UESPmswYJi0eiwgqJgUxkaTn3HvYnENc8V9tIdAp1L_xs5-AAf25DimnZuJB2pUbYCDa8dmfEU52K1P4gad9gQs1VBd5ll5rpCXKcOaTc1R4YD4WG1sFZ718NZlOwsRY1HLO_KfxJd_6EsZlnmlTEaXxah3SHgROOAYca). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ed3794628fb42e181bb13c071a64f62&_e=PjwooA92a9jvfM0jTL3dfPcN0R_OWU411ulDC-RrN74u9F4Sr4tMD6MR2HyVi3S2a_S-0uLBNcl6Pl7nJ9fReFeRJbcQI_RUnHfSZNIQuMVefk0rPAyYehsOArWiBggqNeMfjiuRdsa21EFkGf5-4kJca87vylDpVox3rZMqnvIHyPZRSpB8WT6wrDSfhNX9zHkMKv8TcqJrsbCVyPlGQCMGX7wAM8vv3Lree9mNF2UkKHom7sjMhuAGm_Kqr6gcGKoDoqafncoKfc14zJsHf7Q7EeqDH40CZAjpW6W7jLfzxjU43Ka5iHlt34yGJkqUduuKAiEOtfR4CDpCwKJkRaBWFH0rSmzD-HFn_8vWz8zbSdGzGHwV6wvZ-L-js1BJ) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ed3794628fb42e181bb13c071a64f62&_e=PjwooA92a9jvfM0jTL3dfPcN0R_OWU411ulDC-RrN75tk2x4fcKijkGb7Z9ose6JdsN6fs0dsE_FGQwiQ45r3k88SF1qaAdRHFGfD3VPpaP5yw7ZOooN_p1EOSaETknYlHcN_qElN8xy6IQSgFYPqWMBRWLvk6oHfHRIb7MldZJRFQlbJJbrRksjvJI1WyN3493BqjT-8FVGxEVGWwpkW3v75pJsp9hAj0j_CW1F8zTiN3jXGK3yRxBm-5JzOA8wILvC9KF8JLa3AbY9H_Yu2aHCAFuLaeYMPt421nNOtCOil5r-leCKeldqYEd2OG1pbU-QIfbm_FYoDyX9KsINeqqe6R1OXFwPjlkmKe8PGNv7SlmMRfUdS5aHBJgkuo0C) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ed3794628fb42e181bb13c071a64f62&_e=PjwooA92a9jvfM0jTL3dfGgVoLlCALCiYyZt7ZNo1lc0zzZo-8LMddQD_lpYIsLFyvxsRFnEsEzAZ0Bs1S695JNB_-imp_gdu_MjUUs4WROcCMyNfoDHkCUQUqZ8BtD5l5dxtSD3_rHzMWrjZ8nyHkW3X36GyetFCfSO7H-eKcPraI3jtfqHojAMV42q6EF6QkT4mDaBTYxwIK1DINKTGdGkiX0cWfwraCaaMiiHhw7Sn1q436fry-gxDPhYyLAje2luwWkb5U6-EMaAD7c2Dw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ed3794628fb42e181bb13c071a64f62&_e=PjwooA92a9jvfM0jTL3dfN1gYZNslRKBUCBvyBxCWJP6_o70FAM3_Y9D_s4C-gRV4VS-Oqb6NEIZxAXYmuG0wEr_wgZxsEIgIp5P7gu3RParThXaXLI9H_rg1gSLw5UjLIVmnABPWwarGWdH3U7Vqvn9OnUdEHux8SwyvWr1gx9N3RrMtUiKjOvwyGQFuDbfOlmn4xrbXlUZHJBIosuBivBSkgsiSlWYbo4oEfgJgo-WDc-R1zlNXEeHD7pBGhyy4jSEvyhNC3gM-GW9AFL1qg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ed3794628fb42e181bb13c071a64f62&_e=PjwooA92a9jvfM0jTL3dfJ13NuLtNUjOmyWTDDezhxEG9CY-iaO2Pyv06DJ9FnhDTUmGYqs3L7qxF-Ze_IO7kNI5Blna1xyW9BgMvbhhykZmVCQv0adaRYzjVpwqkQXkH2c7AAO7qCqFoUiRA_keCJ46TDho49i8nxK2qGl6dkYp6Bc1_uzPXoelYK0DJv-MDPNP-x1yCcMKhO1IuTobJBPKZh07EUIuwvwF9dxoLVifGy7n7uBCjQDNbCaJZcHNQ1hmFEs-vPPpZ1Fgy1Mgbg%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ed3794628fb42e181bb13c071a64f62&_e=PjwooA92a9jvfM0jTL3dfPcN0R_OWU411ulDC-RrN75v2YAdQ0GFmG7c46fET1KCMD35kerxTPBoaneOkXj21cvLnuWJtSUcfBO6caxyfmUoxMwtqonPOrRaJ1fvAEnIj157Tc4q2p8IAQMAXqXX0JXd3bAHUD6Y01-ja_9lHkzI3stNGDmYh1A8NEICas0znq8-Vd0Db3bTdglTbwsXSRqgZN2UsKr3uizJKnum0cVIah0-l997V9JjuV0mCxVlYFFh7v3eDbK4E3xvVOBvCeSFIdgIHFYmX6eqWvaKgH2in5lf-WL3k6y65A9syHRUzgeNgiUupUoYTJQea-YVYKW59NDevlu8cGGyrjq8lT5E6TxgiJMzYeTGs5SO7aojHPKs6C4hjBwt4ppeQ2OV5Q%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ed3794628fb42e181bb13c071a64f62&_e=DXXimxEGOU7f-bb1G1yDUF4QIHdZOYzT-Nvt6gtG1L9qguvOAima84F6RtoAYRTlvuZF6KNDulvvch4yQbsAC15U4a1UESPmswYJi0eiwgqJgUxkaTn3HvYnENc8V9tIdAp1L_xs5-AAf25DimnZuJB2pUbYCDa8dmfEU52K1P4gad9gQs1VBd5ll5rpCXKcOaTc1R4YD4WG1sFZ718NZlOwsRY1HLO_KfxJd_6EsZlnmlTEaXxah3SHgROOAYca) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ed3794628fb42e181bb13c071a64f62&_e=DXXimxEGOU7f-bb1G1yDUF4QIHdZOYzT-Nvt6gtG1L9qguvOAima84F6RtoAYRTlvuZF6KNDulvvch4yQbsAC15U4a1UESPmswYJi0eiwgqJgUxkaTn3HvYnENc8V9tIdAp1L_xs5-AAf25DimnZuJB2pUbYCDa8dmfEU52K1P4gad9gQs1VBd5ll5rpCXKcOaTc1R4YD4WG1sFZ718NZlOwsRY1HLO_KfxJd_6EsZlnmlTEaXxah3SHgROOAYca) to unsubscribe. name: Rob Portman
subject: Frank LaRose for Secretary of State
body:
| Peter -- Today is Election Day in Ohio, and I am writing to ask you to please be sure to vote - and please vote for my good friend **Frank LaRose.** Frank is a former Army Special Forces sergeant, current Ohio State Senator, and is running to be Ohio's next **Secretary of State**. I’ve known Frank for many years and am proud to support him in his first statewide campaign. The office of Secretary of State is critically important, and no one is more passionate or better equipped to serve Ohio in this role than Frank LaRose. The Secretary of State acts as both the chief elections officer for the state and the front door for all new businesses opening in Ohio. The person elected to this crucial post in November will play a critical role in the upcoming redistricting process as well as preside over the 2020 presidential election in Ohio. That’s part of the reason this office is being strategically targeted by liberal special interests from outside of Ohio. Frank needs our support. Please be sure to vote today. The polls are open until 7:30pm, and I ask that when you go into the ballot box to **please vote for Frank LaRose for Secretary of State**. All best,

Rob Portman [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sYYV_ledEgoYeQO-o30kdJeTLiOkPFE0-_P396RlgQw&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2018_election_larose&n=1)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tgt5i9qzFHm-zEGuH8vKJ58&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2018_election_larose&n=2)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2018_election_larose&n=3)

| Polls close at 7:00 p.m., friend, so make sure you cast your ballot before then! We need every single Democrat to vote this year so we can elect our entire winning ticket!

Friend,

**Polls are officially open, so if you haven 't voted already, we NEED you to go cast your ballot today!**

[**Find your polling place here and make a plan to vote today ->**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4ba12/1a5213b3/690ecc02/7195fc2c/342656189/VEsE/ "http://fl.dems.vote/guide?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Find+your+polling+place+here+and+make+a+&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_GOTV_FL_181106_2_5&source=FDP_EM_GOTV_FL_181106_2_5&refcode=FDP_EM_GOTV_FL_181106_2_5")

Whether you go before work, during lunch, or while you're running errands, it's VITAL you go vote **before 7:00 p.m.** today!

It's time to turn all that frustration and anger from the last two years into action to support the amazing slate of Democrats running in Florida!

[**GO VOTE ->**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4ba12/1a5213b3/690ecc02/7195fc2f/342656189/VEsF/ "http://fl.dems.vote/guide?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+GO+VOTE+rarr&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_GOTV_FL_181106_2_5&source=FDP_EM_GOTV_FL_181106_2_5&refcode=FDP_EM_GOTV_FL_181106_2_5")

Florida Democrats

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: New Poll: Yes, We Are Better Off After 2 Years of President Trump, Even If Dems Won't Admit It
body:
"Despite the fact that the mainstream media has largely ignored the booming economy, the public hasn't." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2f27221f3c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# New Poll: Yes, We Are Better Off After 2 Years of President Trump, Even If Dems Won't Admit It

“Despite the fact that the mainstream media has largely ignored the booming economy, the public hasn't. They are witnessing first hand how their lives have improved in the two years since voters handed Trump the presidency,” the _Investor’s Business Daily_ editorial board writes.

“The latest IBD/TIPP Poll results show that people [are] more optimistic about the economy, less financially stressed, less worried about jobs, more satisfied with the direction of the country, and happier with the federal government's economic policies than they were in November 2016. The public also gives Trump higher marks on his handling of the economy than they did President Obama.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=258a46d5c9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=090135f057&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Rep. Andy Biggs (R-AZ) writes that President Trump is focused squarely on our nation’s sovereignty as a caravan of migrants approaches our Southern border. “We have reached a pivotal point in American history. We have to answer the question of whether we are a sovereign nation of laws, or even, a nation at all. Our national resolve is on the line.”
---
|
---
| “Slogans like ‘Medicare for All’ might fit nicely on a bumper sticker or a T-shirt, but there is a lot more to serious policymaking,” Heritage Foundation health policy expert Nina Owcharenko writes in _[The Daily Signal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ce1ff20039&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The sheer magnitude of the cost of a single-payer system—and the taxes required to finance it—should come as a sober warning to taxpayers: Under a single-payer model you’ll be paying more than you ever expected.”
---
|
---
| “Iran’s economy will ‘crumble’ under pressure from U.S. sanctions if the regime does not agree to a modified nuclear agreement that suits President Trump’s security requirements, Secretary of State Mike Pompeo warned on Monday,” Joel Gehrke writes in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af59b765e6&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The Iranian regime has a choice: It can either do a 180-degree turn from its outlaw course of action and act like a normal country, or it can see its economy crumble,” Secretary Pompeo said.
---
|
---
| “Opioid addiction has become such a serious problem that it can only be remedied through effective and coordinated measures. That’s why we are pleased to see the joint efforts at both the state and federal level in recent weeks to combat this crisis,” _[The Detroit News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6cb8bf6ec2&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. President Trump recently signed the Support for Patients and Communities Act, providing $8.5 billion this year for opioid-related programs.
---
|

clean_body: "Despite the fact that the mainstream media has largely ignored the booming economy, the public hasn't." | | | | | | | New Poll: Yes, We Are Better Off After 2 Years of President Trump, Even If Dems Won't Admit It “Despite the fact that the mainstream media has largely ignored the booming economy, the public hasn't. They are witnessing first hand how their lives have improved in the two years since voters handed Trump the presidency,” the Investor’s Business Daily editorial board writes. “The latest IBD/TIPP Poll results show that people [are] more optimistic about the economy, less financially stressed, less worried about jobs, more satisfied with the direction of the country, and happier with the federal government's economic policies than they were in November 2016. The public also gives Trump higher marks on his handling of the economy than they did President Obama.” | | In , Rep. Andy Biggs (R-AZ) writes that President Trump is focused squarely on our nation’s sovereignty as a caravan of migrants approaches our Southern border. “We have reached a pivotal point in American history. We have to answer the question of whether we are a sovereign nation of laws, or even, a nation at all. Our national resolve is on the line.” | | “Slogans like ‘Medicare for All’ might fit nicely on a bumper sticker or a T-shirt, but there is a lot more to serious policymaking,” Heritage Foundation health policy expert Nina Owcharenko writes in . “The sheer magnitude of the cost of a single-payer system—and the taxes required to finance it—should come as a sober warning to taxpayers: Under a single-payer model you’ll be paying more than you ever expected.” | | “Iran’s economy will ‘crumble’ under pressure from U.S. sanctions if the regime does not agree to a modified nuclear agreement that suits President Trump’s security requirements, Secretary of State Mike Pompeo warned on Monday,” Joel Gehrke writes in the . “The Iranian regime has a choice: It can either do a 180-degree turn from its outlaw course of action and act like a normal country, or it can see its economy crumble,” Secretary Pompeo said. | | “Opioid addiction has become such a serious problem that it can only be remedied through effective and coordinated measures. That’s why we are pleased to see the joint efforts at both the state and federal level in recent weeks to combat this crisis,” editorial board writes. President Trump recently signed the Support for Patients and Communities Act, providing $8.5 billion this year for opioid-related programs. | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

body:

Friend:

When I coached, I taught my teams to play their hearts out every single minute of every game.

An election is no different. There are less than fours hours left until the polls close.

Your vote matters.

If you haven’t yet found time today, please go and vote for Peggy and me. We know you’re busy, but we’d appreciate your support.

Together we can make our vision of One Minnesota a reality. In this state we don't fear the future, we create the future.

Thank you,

Tim

P.S. If you don’t know where your polling place is, you can find it here.

DONATE

| Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor |
--------------------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/AHqWSDLKOoVruHLjkwtiUePJOM6uU5kPuhJDSypXZoQ=/96_zvNcmQClWJxs83CMtH70bp6SUK8E9anrKCnMVPhk=.

Tim Walz for Governor

Mankato MN 56002 United States

name: Heinrich Field Team
subject: When are you voting?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Friend, polls have been open a few hours, so we want to remind you to go vote if you haven't already!

[**You have until 7:00 p.m. tonight to make your voice heard. Find your polling information here ->**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4bf/43d8135f/65af4f81/51018902/308594253/VEsH/ "http://iwillvote.com/nm?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+You+have+until+700+pm+tonight+to+make+yo&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4")

**GO VOTE:** [**https://iwillvote.com/nm**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4bf/43d8135f/65af4f81/51018905/308594253/VEsE/ "http://iwillvote.com/nm?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+httpsiwillvotecomnm&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4")

_Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:_

Team:

**Election Day is here, and there 's one last thing you need to do: GO VOTE!**

[Find your polling information here ->](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4bf/43d8135f/65af4f81/51018904/308594253/VEsF/ "http://iwillvote.com/nm?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+Find+your+polling+information+here+rarr&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4")
[**See the entire Democratic slate running in New Mexico so you 're prepared at the ballot box ->**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4bf/43d8135f/65af4f81/51018907/308594253/VEsC/ "https://nmdemocrats.org/statewide-federal-candidates/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+See+the+entire+Democratic+slate+running+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4")

Polls just opened, so if you didn't already cast your ballot, it's vital you go today and make your voice heard.

Every single vote will count. That's why it's critical you make a plan to vote today and cast your ballot before polls close at 7:00 p.m.!

[**Make sure you go vote today. If you already voted, forward this email to family and friends so they cast their ballot, too!**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4bf/43d8135f/65af4f81/51018906/308594253/VEsD/ "http://iwillvote.com/nm?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Make+sure+you+go+vote+today+If+you+alrea&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4")

**Happy voting:** [**https://iwillvote.com/nm**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4bf/43d8135f/65af4f81/51018909/308594253/VEsA/ "http://iwillvote.com/nm?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+httpsiwillvotecomnm&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4")

Martin
---

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---
**Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends!**
Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4bf/43d8135f/65af4f81/51018908/308594253/VEsB/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4")**

Make sure to follow the campaign on **[Twitter](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4bf/43d8135f/65af4f81/5101890b/308594253/VEsO/ "https://twitter.com/teamheinrich?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4")** and **[Facebook.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4bf/43d8135f/65af4f81/5101890a/308594253/VEsP/ "https://www.facebook.com/TeamHeinrich/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4")**

**If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next,[sign up for text updates.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4bf/43d8135f/65af4f81/5101890d/308594253/VEsHBQ/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/texts?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=10+-+sign+up+for+text+updates&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4bf/43d8135f/65af4f81/5101890c/308594253/VEsHBA/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181106_2_4").

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: The polls close at 7pm!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
The polls are open for a few more hours, so if you haven't voted yet, go now! Reminder that if you are in line at 7pm you must be allowed to cast a ballot. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f1/34a064cc/3cc009c/70cd940/2022383052/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Hi - Did you see Stacey's note earlier? The polls are open for a few more hours, so if you haven't voted yet, go now! Reminder that if you are in line at 7pm you _must_ be allowed to cast a ballot. Scroll down for more instructions on how to ensure your vote is counted. And again, if you run into any problems, call our **Voter Protection Hotline at 1-888-730-5816.** Thank you for making your voice heard, and see you at the polls! \- Team Abrams _\--------Original message-------_
From: Stacey Abrams
Subject: It's Election Day. Today's the day. The day we make our voices heard. The day we lead Georgia forward for years to come. _Today is Election Day._ If you didn't cast your ballot early, I need you to get to the polls now. And not just you - bring your friends, your family, your neighbors, every eligible Georgia voter you know. In Georgia, the polls are open from 7am to 7pm, and if you're in line at 7pm you must be allowed to cast your ballot. That means you only have until 7pm tonight to either cast your ballot or be in line at your assigned polling location. But before you go, follow these three steps to make sure your vote is counted:
1. **Check your assigned polling location** \- It might have changed since the last time you voted, and it is likely different from the early voting location you saw advertised. Find your designated polling place for Election Day by logging in to **[My Voter Page](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f1/34a064cc/3cc009c/70cd941/2022383052/VEsE/ "https://www.mvp.sos.ga.gov/MVP/mvp.do")**. If you experience any difficulties logging in, call the Voter Protection Hotline for assistance at 1-888-730-5816.
2. **Bring a photo ID** \- You need to show some sort of photo identification in order to vote. This is to verify your name. **[Click here for a full list of accepted forms of identification.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f1/34a064cc/3cc009c/70cd94e/2022383052/VEsF/ "http://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2")**
3. **Know your rights** \- Your right to vote is sacred. _Period_. Know your rights before you enter your polling location so if something is wrong, you can flag it right away. And if you have any trouble voting you have the right to cast a provisional ballot! **[Click here for more information about your right to vote.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f1/34a064cc/3cc009c/70cd94f/2022383052/VEsC/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/vote/")**

And if you run into ANY problems at the polls, call our **Voter Protection Hotline at 1-888-730-5816.**

The only way we lose this election is if we stay home. So please, go vote. Make sure your friends do the same. And forward this email to anyone you know who might need the extra push to get to the polls. Thank you for seeing our campaign through to the end. I appreciate you, Stacey Abrams
---

|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f1/34a064cc/3cc009c/70cd94c/2022383052/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f1/34a064cc/3cc009c/70cd94d/2022383052/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f1/34a064cc/3cc009c/70cd94a/2022383052/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/staceyabrams/")

1270 Caroline Street
Suite D120-447
Atlanta, GA 30307

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: If you haven't voted yet today, here's where to find your polling place
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Today is the most important midterm election in modern U.S. history.
#

**Today is the most important midterm election in modern U.S. history. So please, read Bernie's note below and take the time to vote today. Forward this email to a few friends to remind them to vote as well.**
[FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6886?t=1&akid=328%2E150750%2Ee2iUWQ)

* * *
Sisters and Brothers -
I want to tell you something that will not come as a surprise to many of you. And that is this:
If turnout across the country is large today, if young people and working people come out and vote, then I believe Democrats will elect a number of progressive governors, state legislatures, will gain control of the House and possibly the Senate, as well.
If turnout is low today, then right-wing Republicans are going to keep control of many of the levels of government they currently occupy.
So our job today, if you have not already, is to vote -- and to encourage the people you know to do the same.
Today’s election is the most important midterm election in the modern history of the United States.
Together, we can put an end to the reactionary Trump agenda and move our country forward to rebuilding the declining middle class. We can create a Congress which stands for economic, political, racial and environmental justice, not for oligarchy or authoritarianism.
Those are the stakes:
**[Use this tool to verify your registration status and find your polling place today. Then please share this email with several of your friends and ask them to do the same.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6886?t=2&akid=328%2E150750%2Ee2iUWQ)**
[FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6886?t=3&akid=328%2E150750%2Ee2iUWQ)
Now is the time for millions of working families to come together and make certain that our children and grandchildren are able to enjoy a quality of life that brings them health, prosperity, security, and joy -- and that once again makes the United States the leader in the world in the fight for democracy, human rights, environmental sanity, and for a world of peace.
Today, we have a great chance to advance our cause -- but that will only happen if you make your voice heard and vote.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6886?t=4&akid=328%2E150750%2Ee2iUWQ)
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=328%2E150750%2Ee2iUWQ). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&akid=328%2E150750%2Ee2iUWQ).

name: Drake Ridge
subject: Polls are open until 7!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
If you're in line by then, you're legally eligible to vote.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ffwME0f6L33M0nW5--XOki8a6x7hyCS7OIeAXqvMUkc=/VbAooodgd9IdI4Wc10sGrQ6a4pq62JfIrF7b2CMEeqU=)
---

Friend,

Steve asked me to reach out to folks on our email list to make sure you know it's not too late to vote.

Polls will be open until 7pm all across the state. If you're in line by 7pm, you're allowed, by law, to vote so **[don't get out of line!](https://act.myngp.com/el/ffwME0f6L33M0nW5--XOki8a6x7hyCS7OIeAXqvMUkc=/VbAooodgd9IdI4Wc10sGrQ6a4pq62JfIrF7b2CMEeqU=)**

See something concerning at the polls? Call our voter hotline at 888-525-VOTE.

**[Still have questions, like where to vote? Visit our Voter Hub for more information.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ffwME0f6L33M0nW5--XOki8a6x7hyCS7OIeAXqvMUkc=/VbAooodgd9IdI4Wc10sGrQ6a4pq62JfIrF7b2CMEeqU=)**

Thanks,

Drake Ridge
Field Director
Steve Sisolak for Governor

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK

name: betofortexas.com
subject: Incredible progress towards our goal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Yesterday, we put out a call for help. We were still a little short of our
final fundraising goal, and our pace was slowing down -- but with new
polling that shows Beto TIED with Ted Cruz, we knew we couldn’t let that
stand.

But then, people just like you answered the call. Thousands of everyday
folks jumped in, and gave what they could -- making a substantial impact
on our goal. Now, we’re so close to our $3.5 million final fundraising
goal.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181106&t=1020&akid=24810%2E444211%2EbNmsUC ]Can you join so many of our incredible supporters by digging deep, and
giving what you can to help us close that gap? With so much on the line,
we need to give it everything we have.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181106&t=1021&akid=24810%2E444211%2EbNmsUC ]Contribute
$3
»

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181106&t=1022&akid=24810%2E444211%2EbNmsUC ]Beto for Texas

The efforts of supporters just like you have helped us make sure we
wouldn’t have to cut a single ad, or a single dollar from our field team
in these critical last few days.

When Ted Cruz fell behind in fundraising, he called in his supporters: 11
outside groups -- including PACs and super PACs -- with nasty, misleading
attack ads.

We don’t take PAC money, which means you’re our cavalry. And in this
historic election, we need you to help turn the tides.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181106&t=1023&akid=24810%2E444211%2EbNmsUC ]Will you stand with us when it counts the most? We can’t afford to
stop our ads even a moment before the polls close -- can you chip in one
last time to help Beto reach his FINAL fundraising goal?

Together, we can make history. Texas is leading the fight for the soul of
this country -- to bring us back from the brink of divisive partisanship,
and back a democracy that we can all be proud of. Are you with us?

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181106&t=1024&akid=24810%2E444211%2EbNmsUC ]Contribute
$3
»

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Today's the day, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
It's now or never.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b67d/2f5ea88d/7b94cd4b/2cbd8734/2839489300/VEsH/ "https://inslee.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/i-will-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-11-06_election-day&source=ema_2018-11-06_election-day&utm_campaign=election-day&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, Finally, Election Day is here. And I can't wait to see all that we accomplish tonight. If we stand together, we'll take back the House and the Senate, stripping power from the rubber-stamp Republicans who keep authorizing Trump's extreme agenda and appointees. We're going to win governors mansions and state legislatures across the country, stopping Republican gerrymandering and allowing fair redistricting after the 2020 Census. We're going to beat anti-science, climate-denying Republicans -- and prove Americans are ready for a better path forward to address climate change. **And we're going to do it all -- but only if we all vote this year.** [**Have you already mailed in your ballot? Or will you be casting your ballot today? Let me know -- I hope I can count on you to power this blue wave with your vote.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b67d/2f5ea88d/7b94cd4b/2cbd8734/2839489300/VEsE/ "https://inslee.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/i-will-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-11-06_election-day&source=ema_2018-11-06_election-day&utm_campaign=election-day&utm_medium=ema") | [I WILL VOTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b67d/2f5ea88d/7b94cd4b/2cbd8734/2839489300/VEsF/ "https://inslee.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/i-will-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-11-06_election-day&source=ema_2018-11-06_election-day&utm_campaign=election-day&utm_medium=ema")
---
Thanks for letting me know.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[COMMIT TO VOTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b67d/2f5ea88d/7b94cd4b/2cbd8734/2839489300/VEsC/ "https://inslee.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/i-will-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-11-06_election-day&source=ema_2018-11-06_election-day&utm_campaign=election-day&utm_medium=ema")

_Jay Inslee is leading a movement to create long-lasting progressive change in America. Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

name: Team Menendez
subject: BREAKING: Hugin has Trump's "complete and total Endorsement!"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

Bob Hugin has spent more than $23 million on misleading ads in this election -- all in a desperate attempt to hide his record of not only supporting Donald Trump, but also acting like Trump and backing Trump-like policies, too.

In case this could not be made any more clear, Donald Trump just tweeted his official endorsement of Bob Hugin on Twitter.

[**Share this on social media and let your friends, family, and neighbors know that a vote for Bob Hugin is a vote for Donald Trump:**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c03/3af3c5d/3852a80f/4ec3614d/199467091/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//go.menendezfornj.com/page/-/Menendez_HuginTrump_110618_1200x628.png")

[](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c03/3af3c5d/3852a80f/4ec3614d/199467091/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//go.menendezfornj.com/page/-/Menendez_HuginTrump_110618_1200x628.png")
| [Share on Facebook](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c03/3af3c5d/3852a80f/4ec3614d/199467091/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//go.menendezfornj.com/page/-/Menendez_HuginTrump_110618_1200x628.png")
[Share on Twitter](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c03/3af3c5d/3852a80f/4ec3614c/199467091/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/home?status=https%3A//twitter.com/BobMenendezNJ/status/1059873727561768960")

It's never mattered more to get out the vote for Democratic Senator Bob Menendez.

He's endorsed by the _Philadelphia Inquirer_ , the _Star-Ledger_ , brothers and sisters in labor, women's rights organizations, and working people all across New Jersey because he'll take on Donald Trump.

Help make sure folks know that Bob Hugin is now officially backed by Donald Trump.

[Share on Facebook](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c03/3af3c5d/3852a80f/4ec3614d/199467091/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//go.menendezfornj.com/page/-/Menendez_HuginTrump_110618_1200x628.png")
[Share on Twitter](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c03/3af3c5d/3852a80f/4ec3614c/199467091/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/home?status=https%3A//twitter.com/BobMenendezNJ/status/1059873727561768960")

Thank you,

Frank Schultz
Campaign Manager
Menendez for Senate

**[Find My Polling Place](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c03/3af3c5d/3852a80f/4ec3614f/199467091/VEsB/ "https://voter.njsvrs.com/elections/polling-lookup.html")**
**PS: Remember that you have a RIGHT to vote on #ElectionDay. Call 1-833-NJ-VOTES (1-833-658-6837) with questions--and share the hotline # with your friends!**

Paid for by Menendez for Senate

body:

---
| | Martha Roby Wins Fifth Term in AL-02

MONTGOMERY, AL -- U.S. Representative Martha Roby (R-AL) has been elected to serve Alabama's Second Congressional District for a fifth term in the United States House of Representatives. She released the following statement:

**“I am humbled and deeply grateful to the people who live and work in Alabama’s Second District for once again placing their trust in me to fight for them in Congress. I am proud of the work we have been able to accomplish, and I am eager to continue doing my part to deliver even more results for our military, veterans, farmers, and all of the hardworking Alabamians I represent.**

**“On behalf of my husband Riley and our children Margaret and George, it is a tremendous privilege to serve our state and country in the U.S. House of Representatives. I am thankful to voters across Alabama’s Second District for giving me the opportunity to continue advancing the conservative principles we share.**

**“E****ach and every day, I wake up and strive to be the best possible representative of our Alabama values in Congress, and I am looking forward to the next two years.”******

U.S. Representative Martha Roby has served Alabama’s Second Congressional District since 2011.

###

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: this is the LAST time we'll ask you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
This thing could come down to a few hundred votes, and with a bit more support from this grassroots team, we'll be able to talk to several more voters before the polls close. But we'll only make it ha
Friends, This is the last time we'll ask you to support our campaign before the polls close in a few hours -- _we promise._ [**_(If you don 't want to read this rest of this email, you can just chip in here!)_**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.06_b3_to_az1&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") The energy on the ground is really positive, friends. **But Tom is the most vulnerable Democrat in the House and Wendy Rogers and GOP Super PACs have been claiming late momentum in our race.** This thing could come down to a few hundred votes, and with a bit more support from this grassroots team, we'll be able to talk to several more voters before the polls close. But we'll only make it happen with your help. So we have to ask. Can you chip in at the link, one final time? [**http://action.tomohalleran.com/gotv-fund**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.06_b3_to_az1&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you, friends, for staying with us. Your support has made winning this race possible. Thanks, Team O'Halleran
| ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.06_b3_to_az1&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo, StaceyAbrams.com
subject: last email before the polls close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
We have a real need here on the ground and we're hoping you can help us. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f7/34a064cc/3dea652/70cd813/2601620832/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Hi - I promise, this is the last time I'm going to ask you for money today. But we have a real need here on the ground and we're hoping you can help us. In Georgia, if you are in line when the polls close at 7pm, you must be allowed to cast your ballot. That means that, even though the polls will technically close, we will have folks waiting in line to vote after 7pm. Our volunteers are ready to drive out to those polling locations to keep morale up, but we need money to cover snacks, water bottles, handwarmers, and other supplies for Georgians who will be standing outside waiting to exercise their right to vote. **[Please, rush a $3 donation right now. There's still time to make a difference in this race.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7f7/34a064cc/3dea652/70cd810/2601620832/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTA2MjAxOC4zLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11062018.3-full")** All our hard work is paying off. Turnout is extraordinary because Georgians are showing up to support Stacey Abrams. Now, we just need to make sure that they hold strong until they actually cast their ballot. This is the last hurdle between us and victory. Let's do this. \- Lauren Groh-Wargo
Campaign Manager
#TeamAbrams
---

Let's do this. \- Lauren Groh-Wargo Campaign Manager #TeamAbrams "" | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-447 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2018 Stacey Abrams for Governor, All rights reserved "" | | Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: We left everything on the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Today, Tuesday, November 6 is Election Day!

If you haven’t voted yet, visit [ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/16705?t=1002&akid=24811%2E444211%2EJs_Ril ]iwillvote.com to find
your polling place and go vote!

We’ve invested everything we can into winning this race.

Your contributions have powered an impressive get-out-the-vote machine --
from our amazing field staff to our advertising program -- up until the
last minute. We’ve done it all together with no PACs, no corporations and
no special interests. It’s been ALL people, all the time.

We hoped that some more money would be donated on Election Day, so we
planned our budget with that in mind. [ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181106&t=1021&akid=24811%2E444211%2EJs_Ril ]I’m wondering now if we can
count on you to make one final donation to Beto before this is all over to
help us pay for this historic GOTV effort.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181106&t=1022&akid=24811%2E444211%2EJs_Ril ]Make a final donation »

Thank you for believing in Beto and this campaign. I am so humbled by all
of the love and support from this team. It’s been an honor working with
you.

Jody Casey

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: One last thing before polls close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- **Polls close in two hours. If you're in line by 7:30pm, your vote will count.** [**Don 't wait to make your voice heard. Please go vote as soon as you can.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd5c/4462dc26/742ca2a9/201f03dd/2581148131/VEsH/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=OH") The energy I've seen from this grassroots team has kept me going throughout this race. Right now, I'm asking you to call on it one more time. [**Make a plan to get to the polls in the next two hours. Or if you 've already voted, get in touch with five friends and make sure they've voted, too.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd5c/4462dc26/742ca2a9/201f03dd/2581148131/VEsE/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=OH") Let's finish this race strong. With gratitude, Sherrod _P.S. I was able to vote with my best friend and wife, Connie Schultz, this morning. We are so thankful for your support._ | [](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd5c/4462dc26/742ca2a9/201f03dd/2581148131/VEsF/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=OH")

name: Gabe Amo
subject: Have you voted yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
|
---
[ ](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a028/5e076a9e/54a4a76f/144255ee/1409382455/VEsH/ "http://ginaraimondo.com")

| | Hey friend, **It 's just two hours until the polls close.** Have you voted yet? If not, get to your polling place as soon as you can! If you're not sure where it is, **[you can look up your polling place here](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a028/5e076a9e/54a4a76f/144255e1/1409382455/VEsE/ "https://ginaraimondo.com/vote")**. As long as you're in line by 8pm, you will be able to vote. Don't take this election for granted -- every vote is important, and your vote could make the difference. After you've voted, be sure to head over to the Biltmore (11 Dorrance St, Providence) and join the team as we watch the results come in! See you there! Gabe Gabe Amo
Senior Advisor

name: Team Kaine
subject: IMPORTANT -- polls closing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Virginia's polls are some of the first to close in the nation, making it one of the most critical states when it comes to setting the expectations for all of Election Night. --------------------------
| | **POLLS ARE CLOSING IN VIRGINIA IN LESS THAN ONE HOUR** Virginia's polls are some of the first to close in the nation, making it one of the most critical states when it comes to setting the expectations for all of Election Night.

We really hope you've already voted, but if you haven't -- why not now? There are plenty of resources to make sure you can still get your vote in! **Click below if you have not voted yet, or forward to someone who may need this:**

[Click here to get access to our voter hotlines, to set up a ride to the polls, or help with any last-minute questions about voting today.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1751/3e0906/7ae31440/3e377403/1709773732/VEsH/ "https://TimKaine.com/vote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+get+access+to+our+voter+ho&utm_campaign=20181106_3_FR_TEAM_polls-closing-LDND&source=20181106_3_FR_TEAM_polls-closing-LDND")

These final hours can be the most expensive of the campaign -- we need to make sure we are responding to every last request from around the Commonwealth. **Can you rush a donation in the final hour to make sure we can cover the cost of whatever comes our way tonight? We still need $1,950 before polls close.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1751/3e0906/7ae31440/3e377401/1709773732/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181106_3_FR_TEAM_polls-closing-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20181106_3_FR_TEAM_polls-closing-LDND&source=20181106_3_FR_TEAM_polls-closing-LDND")

---
| [**DONATE $100**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1751/3e0906/7ae31440/3e377407/1709773732/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20181106_3_FR_TEAM_polls-closing-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=20181106_3_FR_TEAM_polls-closing-LDND&source=20181106_3_FR_TEAM_polls-closing-LDND")

| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1751/3e0906/7ae31440/3e377406/1709773732/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181106_3_FR_TEAM_polls-closing-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20181106_3_FR_TEAM_polls-closing-LDND&source=20181106_3_FR_TEAM_polls-closing-LDND")
---
Derek, in a few short hours we'll be watching the returns in anticipation, just like you. These House races could come down to a handful of votes.

[If you want to help make sure the Virginia Coordinated Campaign can launch into a recount program as soon as tonight if it's needed, you can chip in here to make sure Democrats are prepared and can get out ahead of any outcome.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1751/3e0906/7ae31440/3e377405/1709773732/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181106_3_FR_TEAM_polls-closing-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+If+you+want+to+help+make+sure+the+Virgin&utm_campaign=20181106_3_FR_TEAM_polls-closing-LDND&source=20181106_3_FR_TEAM_polls-closing-LDND")

Derek, you've officially been with us through the end -- thank you for that.

Let's make history tonight.

_Team Kaine_

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: one last time -- I'm asking for your support Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | This is the last message you'll get from me before the election results come in, Peter. It's also your last chance to [**click this link and rush in a contribution toward our final $18,000 fundraising goal of the campaign.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd5f/4462dc26/741ba87f/201f030e/1042824191/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA2cG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181106pm2?refcode=sbe181106pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183") | | | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd5f/4462dc26/741ba87f/201f030e/1042824191/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA2cG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181106pm2?refcode=sbe181106pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
Suffice it to say that your support has gotten us this far, and all the work we've put in has led to today. Your support is the only thing that can get us the rest of the way to a win. And yes, even now with only a couple hours until the polls close, your contributions can make a difference in making sure we have the resources to get as many people as possible to the polls.
[**Here is my very last ask for money before the polls close. Rush in a contribution now >>**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd5f/4462dc26/741ba87f/201f030e/1042824191/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTA2cG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181106pm2?refcode=sbe181106pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: America, then and now
body:
On Election Day 2016, the American people chose Donald J. Trump as their next President. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=54e9f2f3e6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 6, 2018
---
| | |
# America, then and now

**On Election Day 2016** , the American people chose Donald J. Trump as their next President. Two and a half months later, he went right to work on his biggest campaign promise: to help give America “the strongest economy anywhere in the world.”

**Where are we today?** There’s no shortage of headlines, but consider just these five facts about America on November 6, 2018:
1. Four weeks ago, the World Economic Forum named the United States the [world’s most competitive economy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b991c789c1&e=3ee4985eea) for the first time in a decade. “The United States is the closest economy to the frontier, the ideal state,” the report says.

2. America lost nearly 200,000 manufacturing jobs under the previous Administration. Since President Trump was elected, [nearly half a million new manufacturing jobs](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7dd4d2dd96&e=3ee4985eea) have been added. The turnaround is clear: Manufacturing employment since President Trump was elected grew 6 times faster than it did during the final two years of the Obama Administration.

3. President Trump promised 3 percent GDP growth or better. Top Obama economist Larry Summers said that goal was “fair enough if you believe in tooth-fairies.” America’s [GDP has grown by 3 percent](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=59a9a3626c&e=3ee4985eea) over the past four quarters, including 4.2 percent in the second quarter of 2018 and 3.5 percent in the third.

4. The unemployment rate has dropped to 3.7 percent, [its lowest point since 1969](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f85cd3d46a&e=3ee4985eea). Unemployment among African-Americans, Asian-Americans, Hispanic-Americans, and Americans without college degrees have all reached record lows under the Trump Administration.

5. The “blue-collar, middle-class Trump Economy” is the first boom in decades where [blue-collar wages are growing faster](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a0aec712dd&e=3ee4985eea) than white-collar ones, lifting up working-class Americans and pulling them off the sidelines like never before.

**President Trump has taken bold action** across the board since his Inauguration, renegotiating outdated trade agreements, withdrawing America from the disastrous Iran nuclear deal, and earning Kim Jong Un’s commitment to denuclearize North Korea. For all this progress, America’s economic turnaround is likely the most powerful story of them all.

[In their words: The Trump Economy keeps smashing expectations.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6dde653d9d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Something to share
---
|
---
| [Since President Donald J. Trump was elected, 4.5 MILLION jobs have been created!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1235f61465&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=598fc9ce4d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=084fde9419&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=424720bb15)
